Name: Coca-Cola Beverages Singapore, Malaysia & Brunei
Description:
Many of our employees will tell you, there’s something special about the Coca-Cola as a company. There’s a sense of pride that comes from building brands that people love and making the most of ourselves as a company and as individuals.

We have embarked on a new journey of growth, building on our most formidable assets: our brands as well as our unrivaled distribution system and the strong commitment of our management and employees. 

Coca-Cola Beverages Singapore, Malaysia & Brunei is a place where you can make a positive mark on the world. Whether through our sustainability initiatives, human rights work or the ripple economic impact each person creates by simply doing their job well, there are endless opportunities to build shareholder value and make an impactful contribution to many communities.

While we’ve started our journey, it’s not just ours, it can be yours as well.

Name: Secretlab
Description:
The planet’s best ergonomic gaming chairs. We started Secretlab in 2014 to create a chair that could keep even the most demanding esports professionals comfortable for over 12 hours a day.

Today, Secretlab has evolved into so much more. There is a Secretlab chair in the homes of over 3 million users — and we are the chair of choice of gamers and creators worldwide. From top esports athletes to work-from-home professionals, our award-winning chairs and desks are made for anyone who spends long hours seated every day.

Purposefully designed to support you across multiple postures as you move about your day, the Secretlab TITAN Evo and Secretlab MAGNUS desks are engineered to keep you feeling at your best.

Name: Daikin Airconditioning (Singapore) Pte. Ltd.
Description:
At Daikin Singapore, we discover something new every day. “Perfecting The Air”, is our commitment and we strive to identify opportunities and seek solutions to make the air cleaner, healthier and more comfortable. As the only Japanese aircon specialist, Daikin applies cutting-edge technologies to enhance indoor air quality, providing the comfort of sophisticated air conditioning systems to thousands of Singaporeans’ homes as well as for commercial and industrial needs. 

Established in 1968, Daikin has grown with Singapore to achieve many milestones. Daikin was the first to introduce multi-spilt air-conditioning systems when the Housing and Development Board (HDB) was paving the way to house Singaporeans of growing affluence. As businesses boomed, Daikin introduced the world’s first super-efficient VRV Systems for commercial buildings in 1986. 

Recently, Daikin acquired BMS Engineering & Trading Pte Ltd with the aim to play a greater role in being one of the leading Systems Integrator of Building Management Systems, Integrated Facilities Management systems and Energy Efficiency Solutions in the region. Daikin offers comprehensive proposals for building-wide facilities and contracting services focused on cost reduction and service quality improvement. 

In line with Singapore’s green movement, Daikin recognises our role to reduce carbon footprints and promote eco-friendly air conditioning products and green building solutions. In 2020, Daikin partnered SP Group to provide Singapore’s first large-scale residential Centralised Cooling System at Tengah, a sustainable housing estate project of the future. Daikin is the only aircon manufacturer in the world to produce both air conditioning equipment and refrigerant. We are committed to reducing greenhouse emissions throughout the entire product life cycle, doing our best to lower the environmental impact of air conditioning. This is evident through the launch of eco-friendlier air conditioners using R32 refrigerant.

Name: Clearpack Group
Description:
Clearpack is a leading provider of Automatic packaging solutions for Food, Beverage, Home and Personal care, Pharma and Chemical products. We are a 600+ people strong, stable, and well organised group with proven expertise in filling, end-of-line, and complete line engineering solutions. We are leading the industry with Best in Class Packaging Automation using Robotics, AGV’s, Digitalisation including factories of future with advanced technology systems.

With our network of offices, R&D and production facilities and a dedicated team of packaging professionals across South East Asia, India, China, Middle East, and Europe we deliver excellent value to our customers by:
•	Manufacturing & sales of Net Weight Filling and End of Line machines in our facilities in India and other locations
•	Distributing some packaging equipment from our global partners 
•	Providing total services from finalising the project specifications to Installation commissioning and after sales service & spare parts

We owe our success to our esteemed customers and our reliable partners, both inspiring us to deliver "Customer Delight" and not mere satisfaction. It is an endeavour we take very seriously.

We are providing mentioned below automatic packaging machines-
Automatic shrink wrapping machine
Automatic sticker labelling machine
Shrink bundling machines
Case packer/carton packaging
Robotic Palletizers
Complete turnkey line
Automation packaging solutions

Name: UAP | Urban Art Projects
Description:
Incredible things don’t just happen; they’re created,  nurtured, believed in. Arts, culture, and creativity have  always played a vital role in bringing people together.  We continue this tradition with an enduring belief that  creativity can inspire incredible possibilities.

Established in 1993 by brothers Matt and Dan Tobin,  their modest Brisbane practice has evolved into a global art and design studio and workshop. Today, our network comprises three key studios  and facilities in New York, Brisbane and Shanghai, and seven worldwide satellite offices in Sydney, Melbourne,  Chengdu, Shenzhen, Singapore, Los Angeles and Riyadh.

From the design studio to the factory floor, we work across all aspects of the creative process, from  commissioning and curatorial services, concept development, and design assistance to engineering,  fabrication, and installation. With an ingrained culture of collaboration, our diverse team of creative specialists,  strategists and practitioners share an enduring vision  for the future.

By pairing exceptional strategies and manufacturing  capabilities with our team’s unrivalled dedication to  excellence, we ensure that our generation creates  timeless and relevant objects, ideas, and places that  will inspire and connect people for generations to  come. As a company, this is the common ground on  which we move forward.
Location: Global - US, Australia, China, Singapore and the Middle East

Name: PanBlast
Description: Recognizing that the global blast cleaning industry had a requirement for a world class supply chain partner, PanBlast has evolved over the years with workflow management systems, good manufacturing practices and quality control processes, also known as "Dynamic Manufacturing". Products are sold globally via a multi-tier distribution sales model.

Name: HOPE Technik
Description:
HOPE Technik is a Singapore-proud engineering firm that has been evolving the industry landscape with its technological innovations since 2006. The company’s unique structure empowers each of its businesses to develop world-class products and prototype innovative solutions for its global clients. Regardless of how unusual a project may be, HOPE Technik’s dedicated team of qualified engineers and technical staff are committed to translate concepts into reality.

See our community guidelines here: https://bit.ly/31OXD7G

Name: Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Engine System Asia (MHI-ESA)
Description:
We are a part of Mitsubishi Heavy Industries Group, the Asia-Pacific and Oceania Headquarter, sharing its global commitment to using technology and engineering to be a leading producer of quality engine & generator set products. 

We are committed to earning the trust of our customers by offering an experience of reliability. Working closely with our broad network of advanced partners, we diligently apply our expert approach to creating excellent products, and practical solutions. Using the power of collaboration to help support sustainable societies.

Our brand is powered by the following four values;
- Brand Reliability
- Product Quality
- Advanced Partnerships
- A Global Reach

This is what it takes to move the world forward.

Name: Hakko Products
Description:
Hakko Products Pte Ltd delivers high-quality soldering equipment and solutions to our customers in Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Philippines and Vietnam. Our wide range of soldering stations, irons, desoldering and rework tools as well as related equipment and accessories means there's something for everyone, whether it is a simple hobby, or a large scale production line, for beginners to experts.

As an ISO 9001 certified company, Hakko Products Pte Ltd is committed to delivering high quality products, premium after-sales maintenance services, and detailed technical training to optimize the performance of your production line.

Name: PCS Pte. Ltd.
Description:
PCS Pte. Ltd (PCS) is the upstream company of the S$5.4 billion Singapore Essential Chemicals Complex on Jurong Island, the premier hub of Singapore's Energy and Chemicals Park.  

PCS is recognised as a leading producer of ethylene and propylene, and other by-products in the region.  
The capacities of our two crackers total more than 1 million tonnes per year of ethylene, and more than 600,000 tonnes per year of propylene.  We also produce acetylene, butadiene, 1-butene, MTBE, benzene, toluene and xylene.

Name: Supreme Components International
Description:
Supreme Components International is a leading distributor of electronic components worldwide, providing semiconductors, electronic components, and lighting solutions to over 2500+ customers across the globe.
The company has grown on to provide more than just components - it provides value-added solutions to satisfy customers' needs. A strong and long list of franchise lines enables SCI to provide an extensive component portfolio for customers to choose from.

Name: Jungheinrich Singapore
Description:
The increase of global distribution flows and the steadily accelerating pace of IT development are changing the face of intra-company logistics. The result is that made- to- measure, all-round solutions are replacing the classic product offering.

Jungheinrich AG is one of the leading international suppliers in the fields of material handling equipment, warehousing technology and material flow technology.

We offer our customers a comprehensive product range of forklift trucks, shelving systems, services and advice for complete intralogistics.

As an intralogistics service and solution provider with manufacturing operations, we maintain a close-knit net-work providing competent consulting and comprehensive service with more than 850 salesman as well as more than 3,700 mobile service engineers all around the globe.

In short, we give you the good feeling that you can rely entirely on us in all question of intra-company logistics.

Jungheinrich Singapore is bizSAFE certified. It is administered by the Ministry of Manpower (MOM) and Workplace Safety and Health Council (WSHC) that recognize our efforts in managing safety and health hazards in our workplaces.

Name: Demag Cranes
Description:
Welcome to our page! We are excited to announce that we have officially changed our page name from MHE-Demag to Demag Cranes and Components SouthEast Asia.
The acquisition of MHE-Demag by Konecranes was completed on December 5, 2019.

As a proud member of the Konecranes Group, Demag continues to be your go-to provider for original Demag equipment and services across the SEAP region. 
Our expertise lies in delivering tailored solutions to various industries, including general manufacturing and aerospace. We engineer, manufacture and maintain a comprehensive range of industrial cranes and hoists. We provide specialized maintenance services and spare parts for all types and makes of overhead cranes and hoists.

This page is entirely owned and managed by the Konecranes Group.

Name: DENKA SINGAPORE PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
In 1980, to manufacture acetylene black, Denka Co Ltd established Denka Singapore Pte Ltd (DSPL) as a pioneer member of the first Singapore Petrochemical Complex project.

Denka Advantech Pte Ltd (DAPL) was subsequently established in 1989 to produce fused silica filler, used primarily in semiconductor packaging. Denka’s fused silica filler boasts outstanding purity, capturing the greatest market share in the industry.

In 1996, DSPL set up a manufacturing plant for polystyrene on Seraya Island, and after its expansion in 2006 and 2012, the plant has become the world’s largest styrenic resins production chain.

With the incorporation of Denka Chemicals Holdings Asia Pacific Pte Ltd (DCHA) in 2009, Denka Co Ltd has enhanced the group management function of Singapore for the Asia Pacific region.

In 2013, DAPL set up a plant in Tuas South to manufacture the synthetic fiber, ‘Toyokalon’. Established in the same year, Denka Infrastructure Technologies Pte Ltd (DIPL) markets special cement additives in India, Hong Kong, Taiwan and the ASEAN region.

In 2015, DCHA acquired a Malaysian company and renamed it Denka Infrastructure Malaysia Sdn Bhd (DISB). DISB’s subsidiary company, Denka Construction Solutions Malaysia Sdn Bhn, produces building materials used in waterproofing, flooring, surface treatments and coatings.

Name: Delfi Limited
Description:
Headquartered in Singapore and listed on the Mainboard of the SGX-ST since November 2004, Delfi Limited markets and distributes its Own Brand of chocolate confectionery products in its core markets of Indonesia, Philippines, Singapore and Malaysia. In addition, our chocolate confectionery products are sold in over 10 other countries including Thailand, Brunei, India, South Korea and Vietnam.

The Group has an established portfolio of chocolate confectionery brand names in Indonesia including "SilverQueen" and "Ceres" which were introduced in the 1950's and "Delfi" in the 1980's. In the Philippines, its flagship brands are "Goya" and "KnickKnacks". With the Group's longstanding presence and legacy in these markets, our chocolates have delighted many generations of Indonesians and Filipinos, who grew up eating them.

In addition to a well established portfolio of chocolate confectionery brands and an extensive sales and distribution network in its core markets, the Group's confectionery business is supported by two manufacturing facilities, one in Indonesia and the other, in the Philippines. The Group also distributes a well known portfolio of Agency Brands.

Name: Renew Group Private Limited
Description: Renew Group is an international conglomerate involved in the R&D, manufacturing, and distributing of multi-industrial products that include Medical Devices, utility systems, and smart connected devices for Water and Energy conservation. Renew Group has built a team of more than 250 professionals, selling products in over 20 countries in Asia, Europe and the United States.

Name: Legrand Singapore
Description:
As the global specialist in electrical and digital building infrastructures, Legrand is well-established in Singapore as a solutions provider across all verticals. 

Established as a regional office, Legrand Singapore is your source of information for the South East Asia region. With the award winning designs and meticulous attention to details, Legrand products are well recognised for quality assurance worldwide. Offering over more than 215,000 products, Legrand answers to all  requirements ranging from Residential, Industrial and Commercial projects.

Name: ORAPI ASIA
Description:
Present in more than 150 countries, ORAPI (Office of Research and Application of Products for Industry) is the French leader in professional hygiene and industrial maintenance.

Opening in the 70’s in Paris, Guy Chifflot was one of the founding members of ORAPI. By the end of 1992, this visionary entrepreneur became the majority shareholder and gave ORAPI its innovative intuition with a complete dimension in Europe.

In 2004, ORAPI established its first Asia subsidiary in Singapore and reinforced its regional expansion in 2006 with the acquisition of APPLIED CHEMICALS in both Singapore and Malaysia. Later in 2011, ORAPI pursued its expansion in Thailand with the acquisition of Complete Care System Co. Ltd.
In 2012 ORAPI incorporated its first Middle East subsidiary in Dubai to enhance his presence in the Middle East region.

ORAPI markets and distributes its products through 32 wholly owned subsidiaries, together with a network of carefully selected distributors located in Europe, Asia, America and Middle East.

Name: MEDs Technologies
Description:
MEDs Technologies serves companies in the electronics industry, addressing their most challenging RF and Microwave connectivity requirements. We also provide PCB design services targeted at systems designers, integrators and product designers in the field of RF technologies across Asia and the world. We also offer foundry-related services for product designers, system designers and integrators.

Established in 1996, we serve Asia and the world from Singapore and through our network of sales offices across the region. Our customers come from a range of industries such as aviation and automotive to research institutions, as well as industrial and commercial applications.

MEDs Technologies is a member of the Synesys Technologies Holdings group of companies.

Name: AMT Pte. Ltd.
Description:
At AMT, our goal is to be your strategic contract manufacturing partner to help you deliver more innovative and effective solutions. 

We apply over 30 years of experience delivering quality and compliant products that help organizations efficiently prototype and/or commercialize medical devices to meet today’s market demands. Given our team’s experience adhering to the strict standards of IP protection as well as regulatory requirements stipulated by US FDA and European EMA, we can help our customers worry less about compliance and more about their areas of expertise. Furthermore, thanks to our relationship with suppliers across Asia, combined with a streamlined supply chain process, our customers also benefit from a holistic and efficient manufacturing process that ensures value, protects their business interests, and provides peace of mind.

Through our advanced core capabilities in Metal / Ceramic Injection Molding technologies, we help bring designs to life for market leaders in the Medical, Industrial, Automotive, and Electronics industries. By vertically integrating our Class 10,000 clean room plastic injection molding and tooling capabilities, it enables us to offer a broad range of medical OEM solutions. 

We do business across 30 countries and are made up of 350 passionate employees dedicated to advancing manufacturing possibilities to help you and your organization bring ideas to life.

Certifications
- ISO 9001
- ISO 13485
- IATF 16949 

Capabilities
- 3D metal printing services
- Tooling fabrication services
- Metal Injection Molding (MIM)
- Ceramic Injection Molding (CIM)
- Cooper Injection Molding 
- Class 100K Cleanroom Plastics Injection Molding
- Class 100K Cleanroom Assembly Services

Achievements
- 15 inventions 
- 29 patents in 12 countries
- 7 grand prizes and 4 distinction awards for outstanding application of powder metallurgy technology

Name: FLEXXON
Description:
We are a next-generation storage device manufacturer, specializing in hardware-based cybersecurity solutions and industrial NAND flash storage devices. We specialize in standard or customized products and solutions to serve a broad spectrum of industries with a critical focus on Cybersecurity, Industrial, Medical, and Automotive (C.I.M.A) applications.

Founded in 2007 and headquartered in Singapore, Flexxon is a global company with a presence in Asia-Pacific, Europe, North America, and the Middle East. We are proudly backed by Heliconia Capital Management, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Temasek Holdings. 

Rooted in our strong pedigree as a leading industrial NAND flash storage solutions provider, we are committed to protecting the fundamental rights of all digital citizens through constant innovation to address the evolving cybersecurity needs of today. We diversified our product offerings and introduced the X-PHY brand, the world’s first AI-embedded firmware-based cybersecurity solution.

Name: Mandom Corporation Singapore
Description:
Founded in 1927, Mandom Corporation Japan is a manufacturer and distributor of consumer products. To expand its global footprint, the company set its sights on countries such as Hong Kong, Thailand, Malaysia and Singapore.

From hair wax, cosmetics to shampoo, there is something for everyone to meet their daily needs. Some of the brands Mandom carries are: GATSBY, LUCIDO-L, Moist Diane and Heroine Make. 

Mandom Corporation prides itself as a human orientated company, with its key focus on Oyakudachi (dedication to service). The company is constantly seeking ways to improve consumers' lives with suitable products, which is made possible through years of research and development.

Name: Cosmostar Singapore Private Limited
Description:
Cosmo is known as the leading textile manufacturing company for the footwear industry worldwide.

We pride ourselves in our ability to service our customers using a versatile, multi-faceted manufacturing platform offering Performance Linings; Fashionable Uppers; Strobel and Insole Board; Waterproof Systems; Soft, Breathable Laminations; One-Piece Jacquards; Bio-Based and Recycled Materials; and multiple value-added finishes.

We are pleased to offer environmentally-friendly, sustainable options at key price points. We also take great effort in working on R&D exclusive partnerships with key brands.

Name: COIM Asia Pacific Pte Ltd
Description: COIM Asia Pacific Pte Ltd (COIM AP) is a fully owned subsidiary of COIM S.P.A and was incorporated in 1997. The manufacturing facility is located at 10 Seraya Place, Jurong Island. It produces a variety of polyurethane and other specialty chemical products such as Diexter, Isoexter, Urexter, Imuthane and Novacote products using a number of raw materials and other substances.

Name: HELM ASIA
Description:
HELM is one of the world’s largest independent chemicals marketing companies established in Hamburg in the year 1900. The Company secures access to the world’s key markets through its specific regional knowledge and over 100 branches, sales offices and participations in over 30 countries. As a multifunctional marketing organization, HELM is active in the chemicals industry (Feedstocks and Derivatives), in the crop protection industry, pharmaceuticals and in the fertilizer industry. Our services range from international marketing, distribution, logistics, production and project development to scientific and technical services. 

Our Vision: 	As a family-owned, global company we will be a leading 
                        partner of choice for the chemicals, life science and 
                        agricultural industries.

                        Our global team is committed, reliable and strong in

                        and our employees.

Name: Wavelength Opto-Electronic
Description:
Wavelength Opto-Electronic (S) Pte Ltd was set up in 2011 with our core business in optical design and manufacturing laser optics, infrared optics, optical modules, complex system customization and optics rapid prototyping. 

We manufacture industrial laser machine process heads for the international laser application market. We also collaborate in extensive research and development, developing small-to-large scale customized complex optical systems and providing QA/QC metrology solutions for customers in the international market and Singapore.

Name: KSB Asia South & Pacific
Description:
ABOUT KSB SINGAPORE (ASIA PACIFIC) PTE LTD

KSB Singapore was established in 1988 as a regional center for distribution and sales of KSB manufactured products in Singapore and Asia South Region. 


ABOUT KSB GROUP

KSB is one of the world’s leading suppliers of pumps, valves and related systems.

KSB combines innovative technology and excellent service to provide intelligent solutions. This approach means that KSB employees are close to customers on all continents, providing them with pumps, valves and systems for almost all applications involving the transportation of liquids. A comprehensive range of services rounds off this customer-focused portfolio.

KSB has been growing continuously since it was founded in 1871. Today the Group has a presence on all continents with its own sales and marketing companies, manufacturing facilities and service operations. More than 15,600 employees generate annual consolidated sales revenue of two billion euros. 


KSB WORLDWIDE

With production plants, sales offices and agents in more than 100 countries, KSB is close to its customers throughout the world. Direct contact with local KSB specialists makes it easier for companies to implement their projects quickly, flexibly and at a high level of quality. 


FROM A SINGLE SOURCE: PUMPS AND VALVES, SERVICES AND SYSTEMS:

• Pumps and valves for industrial applications
• Comprehensive KSB services and original spare parts
• Pumps, valves and systems for building services
• Automation and drive solutions
• Pumps, valves and systems for renewable energy applications
• Slurry pumps for mining, suction dredgers and the oil sand industry
• Pumps, valves and systems for water applications
• Pumps, valves and systems for waste water applications
• Pumps, valves and systems for energy applications

Name: Tractors Singapore Limited
Description:
Established on 20 January 1966, Tractors Singapore Limited (TSL) is the leading equipment dealer in Singapore. We are a full line Cat dealer distributing Cat machines and engines for the service territories of the Republic of Singapore, the Republic of Maldives and Christmas Island (Indian Ocean). 

Our ties with Caterpillar go back to the 1920s when our parent company - Sime Darby - acquired the Cat dealership for Sarawak. Apart from the Cat dealership, TSL is also the dealer for Hyster Lift Truck, Parker filters, New Holland Industrial and Agricultural equipment and Sullair Air Compressors. We offer a full range of services including sales, rental, parts and service support.

A Sime Company

Name: Tokimeku
Description:
Tokimeku is an automation solutions provider and systems integrator with expertise in laser and joining technologies.

Specializing in modular, "bite-sized" automation, we empower manufacturers to adopt automation incrementally—without disrupting existing workflows. Each solution is tailored to meet specific operational requirements, whether automating an entire production line or a targeted process. By leveraging customers’ existing equipment and integrating standalone systems to work cohesively, we help our customers avoid large capital expenditures or risky overhauls.

We offer comprehensive engineering consultancy, proof-of-concept development, and design-for-manufacturing (DFM) proposals—each supported by dependable, regionally based service and technical support.

At Tokimeku, we are committed to fully understanding your operational needs and providing expert guidance that aligns with your strategic objectives. Coupled with high-quality offerings from certified brand partners, we deliver bespoke automation solutions that integrate seamlessly into your operations.

Name: CREG TBM Singapore Branch
Description: CREG - China Railway Engineering Equipment Group Co., Ltd. - is a leading TBM supplier with a capacity to manufacture up 280 metro-size TBM per year. Headquartered in the center of China, CREG provides full-range TBM solutions together with its up-to-date technical solutions highly oriented towards project challenges and customer expectations. As of now, CREG has manufactured over 1000 TBMs and bored through more than 2000km of tunnels. Other than China, CREG has also established its presence in 21 countries. CREG is able to produce all types of TBM namely EPB TBM, Slurry TBM, Single/double-shield TBM, Gripper TBM and multi-mode TBM with boring dia. ranging from 3 m to 16 m. These TBMs have achieved exceptional performances and are highly appreciated by customers worldwide. This speaks of CREG's strong commitment to provide technical assistance and manufacturing quality at the highest level. Other than TBM manufacturing, CREG also produces a wide range of auxiliary tunneling equipment such as shaft boring machine, drilling jumbo, roadheader, disc cutters, locomotives, rollign stocks as well as tunneling formworks and building structures. CREG Singapore Branch - Subsidiary of CREG China – is established in 2015 to render full support for Southeast Asia region particularly the after sales service. To date, CREG has supplied over 20 TBMs in Singapore and as of the end of 2019, more than half of the projects have been successfully completed.

Name: Tee Yih Jia Food Manufacturing Pte Ltd
Description:
Tee Yih Jia Food Manufacturing Pte Ltd is the leading frozen food manufacturer in Singapore, exporting more than 90% of its renowned Spring Home products to countries such as Europe, North America, South Africa, Middle East and Asia Pacific.  

Having achieved top spot in Singapore’s prestigious Enterprise 50 Awards in 2000, Tee Yih Jia’s flagship brand “Spring Home”, which won the Singapore Promising Brand Award amongst regional brands in 2007, is known the world over for its extensive range of frozen convenience food products such as spring roll pastry, roti paratha, Indian samosa, crepes, glutinous rice balls, and cocktail prawn rolls, just to name a few. Its brand portfolio has also expanded to other complementary brands such as “Happy Belly” and “Master Chef” targeted at specific niche markets.

As a Singapore International Company, Tee Yih Jia has world-class manufacturing facilities in Singapore, Malaysia, China and the United States, which hold international certifications of quality controls and hygiene such as HACCP and BRC.

Name: FUCHS Lubricants India & Southeast Asia
Description:
Worldwide Number 1 - the world's leading supplier of lubricants among the independent companies
 
FUCHS is a global Group with German roots that develops, produces and distributes lubricants and related specialties. FUCHS is a globally operating corporation, employing worldwide almost 5.000 employees in more than 50 operating companies in more than 40 countries.

We have more than 100,000 customers, including companies from the following fields: automotive suppliers, OEM, mining and exploration, metalworking, agriculture and forestry, aerospace, power generation, mechanical engineering, construction and transport, as well as the steel, metal and cement industries, yet also companies in the food industry, the glass production sector and the casting and forging industry – and many others. 

In close contact with its customers, FUCHS develops holistic, innovative and custom-made solutions for the most diverse applications. As a lubricant manufacturer, FUCHS stands for performance and sustainability, for safety and reliability, for efficiency and cost savings. FUCHS stands for a promise: technology that pays back.

In the region India & Southeast Asia FUCHS has 7 wholly owned subsidiaries in India, Indonesia, Malaysia, Singapore, Taiwan, Thailand and Vietnam and a regional office located in Singapore. 

For more information: http://www.fuchs.com/group/

Name: Chong Lee Leong Seng Singapore Co Ltd
Description:
About Chong Lee Leong Seng
Established in 1959, CLLS Co Ltd (or CLLSE Sdn Bhd) is a leading distributor and OEM of engineering equipment for the marine and industrial sectors. We put the needs of our customers first, providing quality products, services and after-sales support.

Name: Pacific Agriscience Pte Ltd
Description:
Pacific Agriscience is based on a strong and strategic vision. 

A vision to build a world-class cosmopolitan organization with a culture based on creativity, quality and service excellence. Adding value to the businesses of our customers, associates and cooperators. 

A desire to create and to bring agricultural technologies and inputs to the farming community in the most efficient manner.

A need to contribute to the advancement of agricultural science aimed at sustainable development of natural resources for the benefit of current and future generations around the world.

Name: Green Instruments
Description: At Green Instruments, we are passionate about helping our customers demonstrate environmental regulatory compliance and ensure a safe and reliable transport of people and cargo.  Our solutions for emission control, water and gas monitoring, hazard detection and energy optimization, help our customers operate in a safer, more efficient, and environmentally friendly way. Green instrument is a solid global business with more than ten years of experience in monitoring and analyzing exhaust gasses on ocean going vessels. Besides, we are the pioneer in monitoring wash water after exhaust gas cleaning systems. Our head office is in Denmark, and we have offices in USA and Singapore and employ 80+ dedicated and skilled people.

Name: NUTEK PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
Nutek Private Limited (Nutek) conceptualises, designs and manufactures automated production systems to customer specifications. Nutek is highly regarded for its world-class quality products, produced with the flexibility and nimbleness demanded by its customers all over the world. 

Our core business includes PCB Handling Equipment for PCBA industry, Material Handling System for Semicon Industry, Original Equipment Manufacturing (OEM) for Capital Equipment Manufacturers and Original Design Manufacturing (ODM) for other brand names.

Name: SepPure Technologies
Description:
SepPure Technologies creates sustainable nanofiltration solutions to separate chemical mixtures at a molecular level with minimal energy use.
Up to 15% of the world’s total energy is spent on industrial-scale chemical separations. This is economically and environmentally inefficient. SepPure Technologies is disrupting the energy-intensive chemical separation processes, such as distillation and evaporation, through the introduction of novel chemical-resistant nanofiltration membranes. SepPure Technologies’ sustainable process does not use heat, thus lowering global energy use, emissions, and pollution substantially.

Name: LITEON SINGAPORE
Description:

Name: Astaara Technology
Description:
Astaara Technology is a Singapore Company specialized in the manufacturing of Leak Detection Instruments specially developed to detect leaks in flexible packaging for the Food, Pet Care & Cosmetic Industries.
 
We are using the only method suitable for this application, “Flow Measurement at a Constant Pressure”, as instruments using pressure drop do not work on products whose volume changes during the test.

In addition to extremely accurate and reliable micro-leak detection (from 5 microns), Astaara products offer unique advantages:  

1/ Altitude simulation: we have developed a test to measure the effects of altitude on flexible packaging.  With the AlphaLab, test the resistance of your packaging up to 20,000 feet, discover at which altitude it starts leaking. This simulation is exclusive to Astaara.

2/ Accurate measurements: when leak tests are currently performed on products where there is little space inside the package between the product and the film (headspace), the hollow needle used by our competitors gets regularly stuck in the product and clogs very frequently, and the results are not reliable. Astaara has developed and patented a unique perforation method that prevents this blockage: the AlphaTower.

3/ Cost savings: because we accurately measure the pressure at which packaging starts to leak, manufacturers can choose the most suitable packaging material for their product, and make substantial savings by selecting a film that is not too thick and therefore too expensive.

4/ Automation: the AlphaPro manufactured by Astaara is today the one and only way to AUTOMATICALLY perform sample leak detection on flexible packaging without any human intervention. Food, Pet Care & Cosmetic Manufacturers are now able to automatically manage leak detection and analyze immediate digital tests results with the AlphaPro.

Name: Norbar Torque Tools Pte Ltd

The NATA accredited laboratory in Adelaide, South Australia and NVLAP accredited laboratory in Willoughby, Ohio, USA use the same equipment and procedures as the factory's UKAS accredited laboratory. The new SAC-SINGLAS laboratory in Singapore now has the same facilities for Asian customers.

In addition to this, most of Norbar's distributors offer repair , calibration & recalibration services. Several have calibration accreditation by their local standards organisations.

The company was established in 1942. The "North Bar Tool Company" (as Norbar was then known) became the first company in Britain to commercially manufacture a torque wrench. Our blend of tradition, expertise, and cutting-edge technology sets us apart in the industry. Name: 2DM
Description:

The company’s mission is to expand the frontier of materials application through the use of high performance graphene.

Our core technology is a proprietary graphene production process developed at the Centre for Advanced 2D Materials at National University of Singapore, the first dedicated Centre towards graphene research in Asia, which was established under the leadership of Prof. Antonio Castro Neto and the scientific advice of Nobel Laureates in Physics for graphene – A.Geim and K. Novoselov.

We are a spin off company from the National University of Singapore and our founders and advisors are among the foremost internationally renowned experts in the graphene and materials field. We are also supported by Enterprise Singapore, a government agency championing enterprise development in Singapore.

2DM produces a high quality graphene, with high purity, consistency and graphene content via a production process that is consistent and scalable.

As a result, we have proudly emerged as the leading HD media manufacturing establishment within the Resonac HD family.

We prioritize the production of high-quality and reliable HD media to cater to the diverse needs of our valued customers. Our success stems from our dedicated workforce effectively leveraging the synergies among our various Resonac HD manufacturing sites, worldwide, to continuously overcome challenges and attain set-goals and beyond.

At Resonac HD Singapore, we boast state-of-the-art cleanroom facilities and equipment that adhere to the highest industry standards. Our Research and Development team is unwavering in its dedication to engineer continuous improvements in storage density and reliability. The Operations team is equally committed to utilize automation, efficient machines, data analytics and IoT to relentlessly achieve Quality and top Efficiency in Manufacturing.

Resonac HD Singapore strides into the future with Solid Vision & Solid Integrity to have Open Minds & Open Connections and shall remain continuously Agile & Flexible to Passionately Drive for Results and Excellence.

Name: Sunlight Electrical
Description:
Empowering the availability of energy for 50 years

SUNLIGHT, a bespoke name for switchboards, distribution and control panels of global standard. Established in 1970, by Lim Kwang Joo as an electrical wiring company; today has grown to serve many global markets with regional manufacturing plants in Singapore, Vietnam and Malaysia. Sunlight Electrical is a company of Chint Group.

SUNLIGHT switchboards are installed in many energy-availability critical, prestigious, and iconic installations such as data centres, integrated resorts, finance centres, air and sea ports, healthcare campus, just to name a few.

Sunlight Electrical’s success is indebted from supports of numerous partners, loyal customers and dedicated staff. Always making the dream and foresight of its Founder into reality.

Instilled with spirit of innovation and pursuit of advancement, Sunlight Electrical will relentlessly introduce, improve and provide advance solutions to energy distribution with commitment to environment sustainability and smart applications.

Name: Global Amines Company
Description: The Global Amines Company is one of the world leading companies for the production and sales of fatty amines and selected amines derivatives. We combine Wilmar's integrated agribusiness model and its strong position in oleochemicals with Clariant's technical expertise and long established market presence in the amines and derivatives market.

Name: Wizlogix Pte Ltd
Description: Wizlogix Pte Ltd is a highly reputable company specializing in Printed Circuit Boards (PCB) Design, Fabrication, Assembly and Technical Competency Courses services. The global reach we offer to our primarily Singaporean client base enables them to tap on opportunities in Asia, Europe, Canada and USA. Our highly skilled and experienced engineers utilize the latest CAD tools and offer practical and relevant advice in the field of electronics, particularly in high-speed digital and analog design. Harness the full extent of your product development expertise by entrusting us.

Name: HWACHEON Machinery Asia
Description:
HWACHEON ASIA is the Asia-Pacific office for HWACHEON KOREA - South Korea's first and largest independent CNC machine tool builder. Founded in 1952, we are one of the first companies in the world to develop smart operating systems and automation software for CNC machine tools. Our manufacturing strengths lie in the deep vertical integration of machine tool manufacturing in machining, assembly and spindle production, supported by:

 TRADITION & TECHNOLOGY: Through continuous R&D efforts, we produce high quality machines that exceeds customer expectations, creating synergy through the vertical systematization of machine tools.

FOUNDRY & CASTING: To ensure the durability and precision of our machines, we use premium raw materials and unique casting technologies to produce top grade casting products like machine beds and other major components.

EXPERTISE & CRAFTSMANSHIP: Our finely honed skills in manual scraping helps us to achieve utmost precision, ensuring unparalleled accuracy, vibration control, and stability for our machine tools even during heavy-cutting

Made and assembled in South Korea, our CNC machine tools are designed and engineered to meet exacting standards of quality, durability and performance. They can handle a wide range of machining tasks - from precision machining of die & mold parts to heavy cutting and machining of large and complex parts.

◆ Smart Machines
◆ 5-Axis CNC Machining Centres
◆ CNC Lathes
◆ CNC Milling Machines
◆ Machining Software (for certain models)

All Hwacheon customers can further benefit from our 8-Point Sales and Service package:

⇒ Pre-sales and after-sales consulting
⇒ One-year onsite warranty (with option for extension)
⇒ Offsite and onsite technical support
⇒ Regular software upgrades
⇒ Comprehensive user training
⇒ Comprehensive life-cycle maintenance programme
⇒ Continuous R&D support
⇒ Ready availability of spare parts

To find out more, call us at +65-6515-4357 or email enquiry@hwacheon.com.sg

Name: Float Foods
Description:
We are dedicated to making the world a better, healthier place. Sounds cheesy, but it's true.

Let's start with the environment. We realise that we are part of the problem. So we want to change things. 

1. We are going to work hard to bring about change in our environment by transforming how we eat and what we eat. We don't want animals to suffer at our expense, and we don't want to harm the planet.  

2. We also want to live healthy and clean. We want to build up our local capabilities by offering tasty nutrient-dense plant based foods, by leveraging food tech and innovation.

3. We want our supply chains to be within our borders. We can do this by investing in local production so that we can make a substantive impact on our food supply and security. 

We want a new future of food, today.

Job opportunities: https://www.floatfoods.com/copy-of-press

Name: Omni Mold Ltd
Description:

Name: Cairnhill Metrology
Description:
Cairnhill Metrology Pte Ltd is an industrial metrology solutions provider established on 16 August 1983. Working with a long-term view, we partner with principals who are global leaders in their fields, whose strengths in technology and innovation, we complement with up-to-date uniform high standards of service delivery through our network of offices in Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, the Philippines and Thailand.


Our Vision is to be our customers' trusted industrial metrology solutions provider of choice in the region.


Our Mission is to support our customers' quests for production efficiencies and quality via appropriate and reliable metrology solutions, supported throughout the solutions useful life.


Our Values are summed up in the Golden rule, "What you wish that others do to you, do so to them".”

Manufacturers today must deliver value amidst critical challenges of rapid innovation, miniaturization and global competition. Their only constant is change. Under this paradigm, efficient and reliable metrology is an indispensable pillar alongside good manufacturing practice.

Our solutions, grouped by applications:
1) Food, Pharmaceutical Industrial Solutions
2) Industrial X-Ray Computed Tomography
3) Industrial Metrology
4) Portable Metrology
5) Software for Dimensional Metrology, Analysis, Control and Design
6) Technical Services

Name: igus ASEAN
Description: igus Singapore Pte Ltd was established in 1997 and is the HQ office for the ASEAN region. Our geographical coverage includes Singapore, Malaysia, Thailand, Indonesia, Vietnam and the Philippines. The ASEAN markets are well supported via a wide network of both igus sales and service personnel, as well as igus officially appointed agents and distributors throughout the region. igus Singapore also takes care of any service or support requirements for your machines brought into the region from igus Germany and other subsidiaries round the world.

Name: WK Asia-Pacific Environmental Pte Ltd
Description:
For more than 5 decades, WK, a CECO Environmental Brand, has been a trusted partner for industrial air-pollution-control and energy-recovery-systems. With the establishment of the company in 1959 in Wetzlar, Germany, we have put all our efforts in the design and development of highly performing air-treatment and energy-recovery-systems. 

Our Asian Pacific Headquarters, located in Singapore, has been established in 2003 and serves with a multi-disciplinary engineering team for process, mechanical and electrical for the Asia Pacific region.

A continuous development of our products in compliance with the latest standards for safety, control and industrial exhaust cleaning, guarantees our customers a highly performing and efficient product. In times of increasing air-pollution and decreasing energy-sources our products are extremely environmentally friendly.

CECO Environmental is a leading environmentally focused, diversified industrial company whose solutions protect people, the environment, and industrial equipment across the globe, serving a broad landscape of industrial air, industrial water and energy transition markets.  In regions around the world, CECO works to improve air quality, optimize the energy value chain and provide custom engineered solutions for applications including oil and gas, power generation, water and wastewater, battery production, poly silicon fabrication, chemical and petrochemical processing along with a range of others. CECO is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol “CECO”. For more information, please visit www.cecoenviro.com.

Name: Flash Tekk Engineering
Description:
Flash Tekk specializes in the design, supply and manufacturing of diving and subsea equipment for the international offshore industry. Our employees are to provide top-class quality services/knowledge/equipment with excellent high standards. 

We design and build complete range of diving systems from air to “Built-in” Saturation Diving Systems. All of our equipment is to be designed and built to compliant and class (DNV, ABS, RMRS, IMCA).  Our company strives for the highest quality craftsmanship, innovative and cost effective solutions to our client. Our substantial experience and established network with notable equipment manufacturers have assisted Flash Tekk to become one of the major diving equipment suppliers in the world.

Name: Creatz3D Pte Ltd
Description:
At Creatz3D, we’re here to help businesses tackle the challenges of traditional manufacturing with innovative 𝗮𝗱𝗱𝗶𝘁𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝗺𝗮𝗻𝘂𝗳𝗮𝗰𝘁𝘂𝗿𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝘀𝗼𝗹𝘂𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻𝘀. With a customer-first approach and deep technical expertise since year 2012, we provide services designed around your needs.

Name: Pegasus Sewing Machine Singapore
Description:
PEGASUS sewing machines is the globally recognized leading company for chainstitch machines.
Established in 1914 in Japan , Pegasus has been the pioneer of many key developments in the field of overlock, safety chainstitch and interlock machinery. Drawing on information and data received domestically, from Japan and around the world, Pegasus constantly improves and innovates its products to meet the new stringent standards of quality control and production efficiency expected by the garment industries of today. 

High speed, durable, operator and technically friendly, beautiful seams are some of the words that are synonymous with the name of Pegasus. Coupled with efficient and responsible manpower, Pegasus is poised to take on the new challenges of the apparel industry with vigour and confidence.

New cutting edge technology and chainstitch know-how have lead to the creation of the world's smallest cylinderbed interlock machine, the world's fastest overlock machines, the world's fastest interlock machines and the list goes on.

These achievements are largely due to the intimate relations fostered between Pegasus and its customers and agents. Enabling the tranparent and open exchange of information for the betterment of all concerned.

Pegasus strives for the best, with you and for you.

Name: Leistritz SEA Pte. Ltd.
Description:
Leistritz stands for technologically sophisticated products and a high level of innovation. We are globally active group of companies with the four business units of turbine, pump, extrusion and production technology under the umbrella of Leistritz AG.

With turbine components for the aerospace industry and energy technology, screw pumps for the industries such as oil and gas, the chemical industry and shipbuilding, twin screw extruders for the plastics and pharmaceutical industries as well as tools and machine tools for the automotive industry and mechanical engineering, we offer a wide range of solutions The great understanding of products and technologies is the result of a constant development dynamic.

Name: LUBIMAX

We offer unparalleled services to transform your requirements and expectations into winning attributes for the market. Consistent with the market demand, our products are uniquely tailored to enhance client experience and add value to their needs. Name: Meiban Group Pte Ltd
Description: Meiban Group is one of the best contract manufacturers in Singapore and in Malaysia. Creating and making new products with excellence in quality is in our culture. With our strong competence in mold technology and mastery in molding, we are one of the best injection molding and manufacturer in town. Come shape your ideas with us. We are committed to make your business successful.

Name: Mosca Asia Pacific Group
Description:
Mosca strapping machines and systems offer customized solutions for securing pallets, closing boxes, bundling goods or as a handling aid. Over the last decades the family-owned Germany enterprise has established itself as a quality and technology leader when it comes to developing and manufacturing high-quality strapping machines, straps and load-securing systems. Whatever the industry or product requirements, Mosca provides excellence in strapping to meet diverse packaging needs. A vast variety of more than 52 distinct machine types are tailored for different industries – be it Cardboard & Paper, Food & Beverages, Mail & Order Logistics or Newspaper. Mosca also produces strapping material in PP (Polypropylene), PET (Polyester) and PLA (Polylactid) which comes in a wide array of sizes, widths and thicknesses. 

Mosca Asia was founded in 1997 as a regional hub providing sales and after-sales services to South-East Asia. The first office was established in Singapore, Asia’s financial and logistic center, where the headquarters of Mosca Asia is still located today. Since then Mosca in the Asia-Pacific region has come a long way with the establishment of further offices in Australia, Indonesia, Malaysia and Thailand. 

Email: asia@mosca.com

Name: PALFINGER Asia Pacific
Description:
With its APAC headquarters in Singapore, PALFINGER APAC operates with more than 500 employees with local facilities and offices across China, India, Japan. South Korea, Indonesia, Vietnam, and Singapore. 

PALFINGER creates the most innovative lifting solutions on land and at sea worldwide.
Through entrepreneurship, respect and learning our employees set the benchmark in technology, digitalization, quality, safety and service.
Sustainability and high flexibility drive us to ensure the responsible and effective use of resources.

Worldwide we have 39 production entities and more than 10.000 employees.

Name: Berger Paints Singapore
Description:
Two and half centuries. Over 150 countries. A billion people. That is how deep the roots of Berger go.

We have been adding colour and protection to the landmarks of Singapore since 1939. With over 75 years of experience, we understand your unique preferences and desires like no other and strive to meet them every single time.

With a wide product range covering architectural, industrial & marine coatings along with cutting edge technology, we are committed to provide the highest standard of products, service and support.

Sustainability is the corner stone of all our endeavours. As we stride towards a greener planet, we assure products and solutions that are safe for health and environment.

Name: FoodPlant Pte Ltd
Description:
Singapore’s first shared facility for small-batch food production, FoodPlant, promotes and facilitates innovation within the local food manufacturing industry by providing affordable access to a wide range of pilot scale equipment. It also provides opportunities for collaboration amongst local food companies, as well as deep skills training for industry-ready food technologists, to strengthen and develop the industry’s adoption of advanced and cutting-edge food processing technologies.

Jointly established by the Singapore Institute of Technology, Enterprise Singapore and JTC, FoodPlant is anticipated to be ready in 2022. The facility will be located at JTC Food Hub @ Senoko.

Name: EP POWER

EP-POWER have the expertise to design and deliver a reliable Power Solutions to meet your power requirements. The manufacturing know-how to meet your quality requirement and the professional team to support your business needs.

Alstern believes people are the most valuable asset of the company and welcome like-minded individual to join the Singapore firm and strive towards its vision of Zero Carbon Foot Print Engineering Firm.

Name: Uhlmann Packaging Systems Singapore Pte. Ltd.
Description:

Whether the project planning of new machines, the supply of tools and spare parts or support services - we are at your disposal.

Name: Singapore Precision Engineering And Technology Association
Description: Celebrating 40 years of history, SPETA is a forefront trade association serving and driving the precision engineering community towards adoption of advance manufacturing technology and Industry 4.0. Currently, SPETA has more than 300 active members comprising of both locally registered SMEs and MNCs engaging in the manufacturing and distribution of precision engineering components, products, tools, equipment and machinery supporting diverse industries from aerospace, automotive, medical to semiconductor.

Name: ZIEHL-ABEGG SEA Pte. Ltd.
Description:
About Ziehl-Abegg
 
Ziehl-Abegg (Künzelsau, Germany) is one of the leading global companies in the field of ventilation, control and drive technology. In the 1950s, Ziehl-Abegg established the basis for modern fan drives: external rotor motors which even today are still seen as state-of-the-art worldwide. Another area of business is electric motors which provide the power, for example, for elevators, medical applications (computer tomography equipment) or deep-sea underwater vehicles.
 
The high-tech company has an impressive innovative capability. Ziehl-Abegg (year 2023) employs 2,800 personnel in its production plants in southern Germany. The company has a global workforce of 5,000 spread between 17 production plants, 30 companies and 117 sales locations. The products, approx. 30,000 in all, are sold in more than 100 countries. Turnover totals 955 million euros.
 
Emil Ziehl founded the company in Berlin in 1910 as a manufacturer of electric motors. After World War II the company’s headquarters were relocated to southern Germany. Ziehl-Abegg SE is not a listed company but instead is family-owned.

For more information go to www.ziehl-abegg.com

Name: Ferco Shutters & Seating Systems
Description:
Ferco Shutters is an international manufacturer and distributor of a range of doors and shutters for fire and smoke, industrial and commercial use. Over 30 years, we have grown to develop regional operations out of Dubai and Singapore. Today our engineers and consultants are able to provide valuable assistance from creating design solutions at the conception of the project to installation and best in class after sales service. 

Ferco (Seating) specializes in the design and manufacture of auditorium, cinema, home theatre, education and stadium seating. European design with Asian manufacturing ensures cost-effective, top quality products for customers. With a network of agents in Europe, the Middle East, Southeast Asia and the Pacific Rim, we've installed over 1,000,000 seats in over 32 countries in 30 years.

Name: MAGMA Engineering Asia-Pacific
Description:
MAGMA is a world-wide leading developer and supplier of software for casting process simulation.
 
The name MAGMA stands for robust and innovative casting solutions as well as a strong partnership with the metal casting industry. By combining casting process knowledge with simulation competence, MAGMA partners with our customers to use our expertise to their advantage in the profitable optimization of castings and casting processes. MAGMA’s product and service portfolio includes the powerful, modular simulation software MAGMASOFT, with the newest release MAGMA5, as well as engineering services for casting design and optimization.

Name: SPCI HELM
Description: With the joint venture with HELM AG (“HELM”) on June 2022, we are now known as SPCI HELM. The partnership of the two owner-led family businesses is based on a solid strategic fit and broad share of values. In this joint venture, SPCI is contributing its extensive knowledge in the production of inorganic chemicals, meanwhile HELM is providing its supply chain know-how and commercial expertise through its global market presence. HELM’s international marketing knowledge and infrastructure supports SPCI’s entry into the larger Southeast Asia region, while HELM will benefit from SPCI’s role as a known and trusted producer and distributor in the region.

Name: Tai Sun (Lim Kee) Food Industries Pte Ltd
Description: Singapore-based Tai Sun (Food Industries) is a high-growth innovative packaged food company specializing in producing tasty and quality snack food. Established in 1966, what initially started out as a modest family business has since expanded and grown throughout the years.

Name: Trilogy Technologies
Description:
Trilogy Technologies (3logytech) is a one-stop engineering service and solution provider bringing design to production with DFM as part of the developmental package. We are ISO 9001 Quality Management System (QMS), ISO 14001 Environment Management System (EMS) and ISO 13485 Medical Devices certified, and are able to perform IPC Class 3 standards. IPC trainings are also available for IPC-610, IPC-620 and IPC-J-STD. 

We are involved in various stages of customer’s products design and developmental cycle, and are capable to conceptualize ideas to actual prototype, deployment manufacturing, and final product, with our R&D and production team.

Name: ATE (Advanced Technology Enterprise)
Description:
ATE is committed to empowering local engineers to meet engineering challenges through best-in-class engineering technology. 

Beginning as SOLIDWORKS reseller, we have transformed into a top-tier 3D Engineering Solutions company providing software, hardware and best-practice processes and services. 

Today, ATE continues to provide SOLIDWORKS Suite of products through its subsidiary CADVision Systems in Singapore and Malaysia. In addition, ATE continues to develop partnerships with market-leading products such as Altair, Ultimaker, SolidCAM and many more through its alliance of partners. In addition, we consult with clients in the adoption of best-practices and technologies using SIRI as a framework to prepare them for Industry 4.0 adoption. 

Our clients range in size and represent all industry segments, giving our team members the opportunity to absorb and distill best-practices from each industry.

With extensive industry domain knowledge, our people can complement your engineering and manufacturing team to transform into market-leaders in your own markets. 

Contact us to discuss your engineering needs, including training and enablement services. 

Company Portfolio:
Computer Aided Design - CAD: 2D / 3D || Computer Aided Engineering - CAE || Computer Aided Manufacturing - CAM || Additive Manufacturing - Plastics, Metal || Product Lifecycle Management || Technical Communication || Industry 4.0 Consulting and Adoption || SIRI

You may contact us via:
Website: https://ateworks.net
Email: info-sg@ateworks.net
Phone: +65 6747 0502

Name: JCB East Asia
Description:
JCB is one of the largest privately owned engineering and manufacturing companies in the UK and the World's third largest manufacturer of construction machinery. With a global presence and manufacturing facilities on 4 continents, we employ over 15,000 people worldwide and produce over 300 different products. 

With a trusted brand that is synonymous with world class innovation. Our team design and build machines for hard work and reliability, using only the most advanced technology and techniques. We produce a broad spectrum of machines from 800kg to nearly 50 tonnes for markets including traditional construction through to defence, waste recycling and agriculture. 

JCB's success is built upon constant customer focus and innovation in everything we do. Always looking for a better way.

Name: Dragon Industries
Description:
Dragon Industries is a global leader in explosion protection and modular safety solutions for high-risk, mission-critical environments. Founded in 2004 and headquartered in Shanghai, we serve industries including oil & gas, petrochemical, marine, semiconductor, and defense across more than 30 countries.

Our comprehensive portfolio features explosion vents, flameless venting systems, spark detection and extinguishing solutions, non-return and pinch valves, blast protection systems, tank venting solutions, and high-efficiency air filtration units.

Dragon Modular — a specialized subsidiary of Dragon Industries — focuses on modular infrastructure for critical operations. We design and deliver Blast-Resistant Modules (BRMs), SIP units, E-Houses, Lab Modules, and other tailored containerized solutions for both offshore and onshore applications. Each unit is engineered to meet stringent global safety, environmental, and performance standards.

Leveraging advanced engineering, digital design, and validated testing, we offer certified systems compliant with FM, ATEX, IECEx, and other international benchmarks. Our solutions are built in collaboration with globally recognized testing bodies and developed to perform in the world’s most demanding conditions.

With a customer-centric approach, Dragon Industries provides end-to-end value — from technical consultation and compliance-driven design to efficient manufacturing and long-term support.

Our mission is clear: to protect people, infrastructure, and operations—wherever risk meets complexity.

Name: NETZSCH Pumps & Systems Asia Pacific
Description:
NETZSCH Asia Pacific Pte. Ltd. is a subsidiary of Erich NETZSCH B.V. & Co. Holding KG.

For more than 70 years, NETZSCH Pumps & Systems has served markets worldwide with NEMO progressing cavity pumps, TORNADO rotary lobe pumps, NOTOS screw pumps, PERIPRO peristaltic pumps, macerators, barrel emptying systems, dosing systems and accessories, providing customized, sophisticated solutions for applications in many industries.
 
With five manufacturing sites around the globe, NETZSCH researches, develops and manufactures all products in-house and in accordance with the highest international standards. 

Please send your enquiry to info.nap@netzsch.com or call us on +65 6863 4453!

Name: HIMOINSA Asia-Pacific
Description:
HIMOINSA Asia Pacific is a subsidiary of HIMOINSA S.L, a global corporation part of the Yanmar Group that designs, manufactures and distributes power generation equipment worldwide.

HIMOINSA Asia Pacific was founded in 1998, counting with 17 years of experience in the Asian continent. It is strategically located in Singapore, a prime geographic location in the heart of Asia that allows global connectivity throughout the whole region. HIMOINSA has a wide distribution network in Asia-Pacific, currently operating in China, Hong Kong, Taiwan, South Korea, Bangladesh, Sri Lanka, Maldives, Nepal, Philippines, Myanmar, Laos, Cambodia, Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, Singapore, Papua New Guinea, Indonesia, Australia and New Zealand.

With outputs from 3 to 3.300 kVA, the generator sets have been designed to provide both standby and continuos power. Its comprehensive offering of diesel generators is complemented by a full range of gas generators, from 8kW to 1.500kW, using a variety of gas fuels such as natural gas, biogás and LPG. HIMOINSA has designed a full range of lighting towers that are compact, robust and versatile.

An added value of the company are the HIMOINSA Engineering Solutions, a concept that defines the work of the brand, as all their power generation products are designed and customized following their high technical know-how to adapt the product to the unique specifications of each special project. 
They include Turnkey projects, where the company assumes the role of an EPC contractor, taking care of everything from the engineering design of the project, civil construction, manufacture of the equipment and installation and commissioning as final steps.

HIMOINSA also undertakes Power Plant and IPP projects and supplies power systems to major international projects across the globe, providing energy solutions to the construction, telecommunications, residential, telecom, rental, commercial, mining, healthcare and industrial sectors.

Contact us: enquiries@himoinsa.com.sg

Info@tandasystem.com

Its solutions address key challenges in electrification, supporting the rapidly expanding markets for electric vehicles (EVs) and Energy Storage Systems (ESS). JIOS’ unique technology transforms the safety of Li-ion batteries by offering efficient, effective and affordable mitigation of thermal runaway and unrivalled intumescent fireproofing. This breakthrough innovation is based on JIOS’ proven experience in developing affordable, scalable solutions for energy conservation and thermal protection, from cryogenic insulation for industrial plants to extreme-temperature sportswear. At JIOS’ Global Innovation Centre in Singapore, the company continues to harness the unique thermal, acoustic and fire performance of aerogels to sustain the pace of world-changing innovation.

Supported by expert teams in R&D, engineering, and manufacturing, JECT delivers consistent quality, technical precision, and responsive service. TechnoDigm was founded in 2006 as a company based on decades of experience and research along with a sole vision to bring Fluid Dispensing and UV Curing technology to the next level, a real paradigm shift.

Our clients span across industries such as IT/laptop, medical, industrial, automotive and more. Founded and based in Japan with multiple branch offices around the world, we uphold our resolve in the pursuance of the most excellent in innovation and technology where our strengths lie.

Name: Chlor-Al Chemical Pte Ltd / Taiko Marketing (S) Pte Ltd
Description:
TMK Chemical Bhd. (formerly known as Taiko Marketing Sdn. Bhd.) was established in 1989 as the principal trading arm for chemicals manufactured and imported by the Taiko Group of Companies. We are the leading industry player in the inorganic chemicals industry in Malaysia, with multiples facilities and terminals across the country.

Recognizing the importance of constant development, TMK Chemical Bhd. has progressed from supply and distribution and ventured into the business of manufacturing and blending of chemicals, building our own warehouses, liquid bulk terminals and plant to facilitate our expansion.

The Taiko name is synonymous with dynamic and sustainable growth, sound financial fundamentals, professional management and a strong commitment to quality and excellence - our company is ISO 9001 certified to assure our discerning customers that the quality of our products is never compromised.

We believe our people are the crucial building blocks of a successful company, which is why we have designed programs for new hires and existing employees alike to groom and upskill the next generation of leaders who will carry the torch as the company continues to flourish in the industry. 

TMK Chemical Bhd. is imbued with the Group’s culture and philosophy of our founder, who was renowned for his dedication to fundamental business ethics such as hard work, honesty, teamwork and entrepreneurship. These fundamentals have steered the Group through challenges and the Group's exceptional growth over the past 34 years is a testament to its success.

Description:
Tai Sin Electric Limited was incorporated in 1980 and has built a successful cables and wires business serving a diverse range of industries for both the private and public sectors in all categories of industrial, commercial, residential and offshore & marine projects. 

To cater for the robust growth in the regional market, Tai Sin operates three cable manufacturing plants, which are located in Singapore, Malaysia and Vietnam. All of which are fully equipped with the latest manufacturing facilities and technologies to meet increasing demands.

Over the years, Tai Sin has expanded and diversified steadily to become the Tai Sin Group of Companies, which is now public listed on the Main Board of Singapore Stock Exchange (SGX).

Name: ELH Additive Manufacturing
Description:
Established in 2009, ELH Tech has ventured into Additive Manufacturing since 2015 after its era in the manufacturing of Precision Jigs and Fixture for the Aerospace, Oil & Gas and Semiconductor Industries. ELH Tech further joins venture with our Japan and Indonesia partners to set up the SouthEast Asia’s Largest AM Service Bureau in 2019. ELH Tech has partnered up with 8 brands becoming an authorised reseller and distributor of industrial grade products from key players in the Additive Manufacturing Industry such as EOS, Raise3D, Shining3D and more as of 2020 and is continuously expanding. 

ELH Tech provides excellent prototyping services such as Reverse Engineering to 3D printing, Product Design & Development, Conformal Cooling & Topology Optimisation, CNC Machining Processes and Post Processing with a variety of materials from Polymer to Metal.  

Our in-house capabilities include; 
•	Polymer: FDM, SLS, SLA, Plastic CNC Machining, Vacuum Casting
•	Metal: DMLS, Hybrid Metal Printing, Metal CNC Machining

ELH Tech is constantly expanding its partnerships and has collaborations with R&D Teams such as A*STAR, NAMIC, GE Aviation and ST Aerospace to further enhance our engineering processes and capabilities. ELH Tech also collaborated with Educational Institutions such as Nanyang Technological University, Nanyang Polytechnic, Singapore Polytechnic and Republic Polytechnic to enrich students with the capabilities of Additive Manufacturing. 

ELH Tech believes in engaging and building good customer relations pre and post sale of products and services. We strive to solve your problems and be a part of your solution in terms of purchasing products or engaging our services thus being the ‘One Stop AM Solution’ you will ever need.

Name: MEDs Interconnect Pte Ltd

Our vision is to make each of our systems your best investment, by selecting the most suitable technologies, with our experiences and expertise. 

From conventional to state-of-the-art technologies, we provide water treatment solutions that can reliably deliver safe drinking water to municipalities and government entities, high-quality ingredient water for food and beverage manufacturing, pure and ultrapure water for use in the process industries such as power plant, electronics, and semiconductor, pharmaceutical, refineries, and petrochemical industries. 

On wastewater, we have developed cost-effective solutions for municipals, Industrial and Commercial sectors; be it containerized systems or civil-based construction. From consultation to full project turn-key. 

MATTEN has been a big advocator for water reuse and even ZLD (zero liquid discharge), sustainability is a key motivator. We offer solutions for Rainwater and Greywater Harvesting, municipal and industrial wastewater reuse, deploying technologies in biological and non-biological treatment, Advanced Oxidation Process, and evaporators.

a leading provider of integrated automation solutions to the semiconductor industries worldwide. Name: Quantum Technology Group Limited (QTG)
Description:
Quantum Technology Group Limited (QTG) was established by Mr. Chan Ki in 2010, and was registered in the Cayman Islands. It is headquartered in Singapore, and incorporated in USA, Germany, Hong Kong and China. QTG focuses on research in the area of isothermal heat transfer. We strive for technological innovation, and created QIT medium which provides isothermal heat transfer and even with a negative temperature gradient in large metallic and non-metallic thermal components. This revolutionary technological advancement can promote the upgrading of thermal products with improved thermal efficiency, more energy-saving, and lower production costs.

QTG owns the independent intellectual property rights and has globally registered over 350 application patents for QIT medium. The cross-functional team consists of research scientists, professors and engineers with expertise in quantum physics, chemistry, electrochemistry, electromagnetism, thermodynamics, thermal transport, materials science and nanotechnology. QTG continuously collaborates with various established research institutes in Asia, Europe and North America. It is mainly involved in designing, research and development, application and cooperation, marketing and technology licensing. We provide innovative thermal management solutions for thermal products in the global market, and have signed cooperative contracts with over 20 internationally-renowned corporations.

Please visit our website (www.qtg.com) or drop us an email at info@qtg.com for any enquires.


量子科技集团有限公司(简称:QTG)在开曼群岛注册成立。总部设立在新加坡,在美国、德国、香港和中 国设有全资控股公司。QTG专注于等温传热技朮研究,以科技创新为宗旨,开创性地研发了量子等温传热 介质,实现了大型金属和非金属热传元件等温传热及呈现负温差传热。这项革命性的技术创新,令热工产 品大幅度的提高热效率、节省能源,减少全球二氧化碳排放,同时又降低产品的制造成本,势将推动热工 产品的更新换代。

QTG拥有独立自主的知识产权,在全球登记的量子等温传热介质应用专利逾350项。拥有包括量子物理、 量子化学、物理化学、电化学、电磁学、热力学、热传学、材料学、纳米技术的科学家、教授、博士、 工程师技术团队,合作研发机构分布于亚洲、欧洲、北美。是集创新科技、应用合作、介质销售与技术 授权为一体的国际性集团公司。现已与逾二十家国际著名工业集团签署合作文件。

KASTO Maschinenbau GmbH & Co. KG was founded in 1844 and specialises in sawing and storage technology. With a history of more than 170 years it is one of the oldest family-owned businesses in Europe. Every single day, new customized solutions “made in Germany” are developed at the headquarter in Achern and the second production site Schalkau. The position as a global market leader – in technology and quantity – in metal sawing machines and automatic storage systems is based on approximately 160 patents and more than 140,000 sawing machines shipped and more than 1,700 automatic storage systems installed. Name: Woncho Pte Ltd
Description:
WONCHO PTE LTD is a worldwide specialist in integrated intervention services for repairing damaged capital equipment and machinery. 

In the world of fierce competition and escalating production costs, we understand the importance of getting the job done on time and within budget. The availability of our repair services eliminates the requirement for large and heavy machinery to be disassembled and removed from the vessel, platform, plant, or factory, resulting in additional cost and time for dismantling, transportation, and subsequent re-assembly and realignment of the machinery. In most situations, replacement parts might take months. When capital equipment or machinery broke down, all stakeholders would like to have it repaired back to its original condition without compromising on quality, to have a reliable, permanent, strongest possible repair, and complete in the shortest possible time. We being an integrated specialized engineering service contractor will ensure this requirement and expectation will be fulfilled.
