Name: Turvo Oil Singapore | Australia
Description:
Turvo Oil Singapore Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based company specializing in the production and distribution of high-quality lubricant oils for automotive, industrial, marine, and agricultural applications. Established in 2007 by Mr. Ng, the company has evolved from a sole proprietorship into a private limited entity, with a focus on delivering reliable and performance-driven lubrication solutions. 
Turvo Oil offers a comprehensive range of lubricant products, including:

Automotive Lubricants: Engine oils (e.g., Turvo Super X series), automatic transmission fluids, and octane boosters.

Industrial Lubricants: Compressor oils, hydraulic oils, gear oils, and metalworking fluids.

Marine Lubricants: Marine engine oils.

Specialty Products: Coolants, transformer oils, and grease oils.

These products are available in various packaging options, such as drums and flexi bags, catering to diverse customer needs.

Domestic Distribution: Since 2013, Turvo Oil has appointed a main distributor to market its products across Singapore, supplying to car workshops, retail shops, and vehicle spare parts companies.

International Expansion: The company is actively developing distributorships in several Asian countries, including China, the Philippines, Vietnam, Indonesia, Taiwan, and Russia, aiming to establish a global presence. 
Turvo Oil emphasizes stringent quality control measures:

Raw Materials: Utilizes premium base oils (e.g., SN500, SN150, BS150) and additives sourced from reputable suppliers.

Manufacturing Standards: All manufacturing plants are ISO 9001:2015 certified, ensuring consistent product quality.

Testing: Each batch undergoes rigorous laboratory testing, with options for international laboratory verification upon customer request. 
Turvo Oil is committed to:

Innovation: Continuously developing new products through dedicated research and development efforts.

Name: Ultrasave
Description:
Playing essential roles in our daily lives, choosing the right cleaning products is nothing short of an important decision. However, selecting the right cleaning products can be a headache for consumers especially when they have to decide between quality and price – having to pay more for quality or forego quality for cheaper products. Impeding their experiences and satisfaction, this was a void that needed to be filled.

Seeing an opportunity to fill this gap, Mr. David Ng founded the company, Maestro Plus and launched PlusCare Product Series in 2003. With a manufacturing plant in Taman Johore Jaya, Malaysia, and the commitment to igniting a change within the industry, Maestro Plus is guided by the philosophy of revamping consumer’s experiences by delivering cleaning products that are both high in quality and of value.

Today, as a CSR (Corporate Social Responsibility)
company, we strive to play our part to save the environment. True to our commitment, we proudly, introduced the environment-friendly Ultra Save products series in 2019. Being 4X more concentrated and compact in size, Ultra Save products not only perform better but are also able to reduce package wastage significantly. Importantly, the products are still ensured to preserve the philosophy of PlusCare – Of value and high quality.

Product Range: Household Cleaning, Personal Care, Laundry Care & Industrial Cleaning.

Name: Mobi-Air
Description:
Mobi-Air, your air-handling specialist supplies safe high performance air-handling systems including traditional drum-filtration technology and the next generation Mobi-Flex filtration technology. Mobi-Flex has been specifically developed in response to clients requests that in today’s global economy a new technology was required adopting modular plug & play design architecture similar to modern diaper converting technology that can be easily relocated without the need to dismantle/re-assemble and deployable across multiple business units. The result after this significant design effort is a modular singular SKU utility platform capable of supporting adult/baby/fem/tissue converting systems protecting flows of 5–250KCMH without limitation or safety concerns. Mobi-Flex offers a world first hybrid solution; the process flexibility and robustness of baghouse technology with a compact design and smaller footprint versus a traditional drum-filter.

This comprehensively re-designed platform offers a host of industry first innovative features. Equipment housings are built to ISO sea container standards for ease of shipment and elimination of assembly effort. Modular design concepts adopted throughout give seamless plug & play upgrade capability. The platform supports standard fan & HVAC systems and can also be integrated with plug-in containerised process solutions offering enhanced modularity benefits via fan, mill, HVAC, Geo-thermal HVAC & heat recovery.

Mobi-Air, a recent strategic amalgamation of leading filtration companies around the globe operating since 1978 has been formed to provide our client base with a comprehensive, professional and trustworthy global support network. With experienced engineering professionals located across the globe and dedicated support centres in Japan,Germany, Singapore and shortly in USA &LA, we strive to supply our clients with world-class process concepts offering energy efficient solutions that eliminate environmental damage.

Feel free to contact our great colleagues Isaac Laai: +65 9725-2336 / isaac.lai@wenaas.com and Junee Montales: +65 9616 1873 / junee.montales@wenaas.com.

In 1931 Lars Wenaas started up a small garment factory in the cellar of his house in Måndalen, on the north-western coast of Norway. Though hard work, good salesmanship and a strong dedication, several generations of the Wenaas family built the foundation for the company that is now known as Wenaas Workwear. Which is part of Europe's largest workwear group.

Wenaas are the experts when it comes to clothing to protect industrial workers in hazardous working environments and we have set the standard for flame retardant workwear within the oil and gas industry. 

Wenaas has been protecting oil and gas workers in the North sea since the begin of the industry. For decades we have been the industry's preferred supplier of flame retardant workwear, and operators and contractors continue to choose Wenaas. We are proud of the trust that our customers place in us.

Our product experts work closely together with those who will actually use the products. This form of direct innovation, combined with our specialist competency in the industry and products, competitive head-to-toe range and uncompromising focus on the user's personal safety, has made Wenaas the market leader and preferred choice for the oil and gas workers in the North sea.

The well- known Wenaas W has taken on a special meaning for our users. It symbolises safety and provides the user with a special sense of security.  The W is also a guarantee that the product is of a high quality and is certified to the latest EN standards.

We are experts in safety. Our job is to ensure that people feel safe when they go to work and that they return home safe and secure!

Name: Mitsuboshi Overseas Headquarters Private Limited

Name: ZICOM PRIVATE LIMITED
Description:
ZICOM Private Limited is a total engineering solutions provider for Green Energy, Deck Machinery, Gas Equipment. We are founded in 1978 as a pioneering manufacturers of deck machinery(Winch/Windlass, Mooring System, Anchor-handling system, load-handling system) in Singapore for regional shipyards, expanding internationally to markets for Harbour craft, Shipping, Offshore Construction Sectors.

We deliver total life cycle solutions. Starting at project inception, we engineer the system for reliability, intuitive operation, end of life decommissioning and recycling. With our network of satellite offices and international partners, we deliver and support our system worldwide.

Name: Thermapet Technologies Pte Ltd
Description:
Revolutionizing Plastic Packaging for a Sustainable Future 

At Thermapet, we envision a world where plastic packaging helps, not harms, our planet.  Our groundbreaking TPET containers are fully recyclable, withstand high temperatures, and require no harmful additives.

Reducing Single-Use Plastic Waste 

Plastic pollution, largely driven by single-use containers, is a global crisis.  Thermapet tackles this by replacing traditional materials with our 100% recyclable TPET—an eco-friendly, high-performance solution for the packaging industry.

Innovative Packaging Technology 

Thermapet’s Simultan forming technology enhances PET’s heat resistance up to 220°C—perfect for hot-fill and microwavable applications. Unlike conventional plastics, TPET fits seamlessly into recycling systems, supporting a true circular lifecycle. 

Why Choose Thermapet? 

For FMCG, packaging, and food service industries, Thermapet offers a sustainable choice that’s:

100% Recyclable: Seamlessly integrates into PET recycling streams.
Highly Heat-Resistant: Outperforms conventional CPET.
Cost-Efficient: Uses less material, reducing costs without sacrificing durability.
Join Us in Shaping a Cleaner Future 

Thermapet isn’t just packaging—it’s a step toward a sustainable tomorrow.  We’re currently in our Series A funding round and welcome industry leaders and investors to explore how our technology can elevate their packaging strategies. Let’s drive change together!

Name: Galmon (S) Pte Ltd
Description:
Established in 1982, Galmon is the pioneer of Mobile Elevating Work Platform (MEWP) use in Singapore – a specialty which is still the mainstay of our expertise today.

As a leader in this field, Galmon sells, rents and services the widest range of MEWPs in Singapore, including:

- Boom Lifts
- Scissor Lifts
- Personnel Lifts
- Spider Lifts
- Telehandlers
- Truck/Trailer-Mounted Lifts
- Custom-Built lifts
- Mobile Aluminium Scaffold Towers
- Used Equipment

Our equipment undergo continuous upgrades to incorporate new functions and updated safety requirements. This is a key factor that makes Galmon products a cut above the rest.

With over 30 years of on-site experience in the construction, building maintenance, aviation, marine, manufacturing, commercial and public sectors, we offer a wide variety of services which are customised to your on-site requirements and budget.

Today, Galmon is proud to have attained the ISO 9001, OHSAS 18001, ISO 14001, bizSAFE Partner status. Galmon also received the Singapore Prestige Brand Award in 2011.

Our training arm Galmon Academy is an Accredited Training Provider for MEWPs under the Singapore Ministry of Manpower and the only PASMA-approved training centre outside of Europe.

In 2015, Galmon Academy became an Approved Training Organisation under the Workforce Development Agency, offering Workforce Skills Qualifications (WSQ) courses in boom, scissor and personnel lifts.
IMG_2505 (straightened)

In 2015, we received the bizSAFE Enterprise Exemplary Award and the first-ever bizSAFE Champion Award from the Workplace Safety and Health Council.

These accolades are a testament to Galmon’s commitment to offer the highest standard of products and services.

Galmon is Your Safest Way to the Top!

Name: Pan Ocean Singapore Pte Ltd
Description:
Before our establishment in 1992, we were just a small store in the dry market selling fresh seafood. From there, Pan Ocean has grown from a small trading company to a well-established and well recognized trustworthy international trading house with integrated seafood processing factories in China, Indonesia and fishery products collecting stations all over Asa.

To keep pace with digital wave Pan Ocean has embarked on an exciting journey of digital transformation through leveraging the power of e-commerce and social media.

After years of self-improvement and development, our group of experienced and professional management teams and production staff guarantee highly efficient services, premium quality products and of course competitive prices. Removing the need to source and engage multiple suppliers, we provide our customer with a one-stop solution for their seafood needs.

Name: Universal Vapor Jet Corporation
Description: At Universal Vapor Jet Corporation (UVJC), we are working to enable the future of advanced manufacturing. Leveraging its core competencies of precision deposition and thin-film jet printing, UVJC is exploring opportunities in sectors such as electronics, semiconductors, life sciences and more. UVJC aims to continue pushing the boundaries of materials deposition technology, driving advancements in markets that require high-performance, scalable and cost-effective production methods. As a Singapore-based subsidiary of Universal Display Corporation—a pioneer and leader in energy-efficient phosphorescent OLED materials and technologies—UVJC is supported by cutting-edge researchers and business professionals with deep expertise in R&D and commercialization of disruptive technologies.

Name: Jenmon International Pte Ltd
Description:
About JENMON

Founded in the beginning of this millennium, JENMON International Pte Ltd is a specialist in the lifting industry. Our core business activities encompass the supply,
installation, testing, commissioning of lifting equipments as well as servicing and maintenance support.

JENMON is the solution to the Industrial Lifting Overhead/Gantry Cranes, Explosion-
Proof Cranes, Entertainment Hoists and Servicing Needs. Our range of Industrial Lifting
products includes Overhead Cranes, Components, Accessories, Spare Parts of all
brands, Radio Remote Control Systems, Magnets, Industrial Power and Control Cables
as well as Under the Hook Lifting Gears. JENMON has the capacity and manufacturing
facilities located in Singapore and the region to produce cranes from 1 ton to 120 tons,
spanning as wide as 45m.
Our professional service team is dedicated to ensure an operative crane at your worksite
at all time. As the veterans in the crane business, the team is ever ready to provide 24x7 after-sales service, maintenance, relocation and upgrade of cranes of all made.
With years of crane expertise and savoir-faire, JENMON is able to provide professional
advice and excellent customer service consistently. JENMON engineers continue to
undergo trainings to provide practical solutions to companies of all sizes from the various
industries such as the engineering, construction, aerospace, chemical, oil and gas
industries.
JENMON is the sole agent of renowned French hoists and crane components -- Verlinde
in Singapore. All components manufactured in France are controlled within ISO 9001
standard.
Jenmon is also a registered contractor under the Building & Contractors Authority (BCA)
based on workhead ME 11 and has been awarded the ISO 9001: 2008 certification.

Name: Western Energy
Description:
Since its inception in 1991, Western Energy has contributed considerably to the development and growth of Oil & Gas, Petrochemical, Marine, Water and Power Generation industries throughout the Southeast Asian region and beyond.

Western Energy is a full-fledged engineering company, with capabilities to participate in projects from preliminary design of pumping systems and/or engineered equipment to project management, delivery, installation, start-up and commissioning of pumps and equipment.

With 25 years’ experience in the industry, we have accumulated an in-depth knowledge of pumps and application experience. We are renowned for our state-of-the-art products, performance reliability and efficient solutions and
confident that our wide range of equipment will match the most challenging project needs. 

We supply quality and certified products, manufactured by our carefully selected partners from around the world – saving clients’ time and effort by communicating with one trusted company.


WHAT SETS US APART

- Flexibility in offering desired engineering product solutions

- Complete service cycle of sales, design, engineering, documentation, packaging, delivery, commissioning, warehousing and after sales services

- Extensive Approved Vendor List through the years of hard work on the market

- Widest pump portfolio to meet even the most challenging project specifications

- A leading Firewater pump packager in Asia by number of installations onshore and offshore

- Quick response generation ensuring on time customer support


Western Energy believes in providing our clients with a complete experience. 

With regards to after-market service support, working in close collaboration with the customer, our team of highly-qualified, technical staff carries out equipment  maintenance and repairs at our Service and Fabrication Centre or at site.

We operate from Tuas (Singapore) and Indahpura, Johor (Malaysia).

Name: HYTORC SOUTH EAST ASIA
Description:
HYTORC makes industrial bolting safer and simpler. With nearly 50 years of experience focused entirely on developing the highest quality industrial bolting systems, HYTORC is the most trusted name in the industry. From steel mills and mining equipment to refineries, power plants, and wind turbines; we have developed solutions for every bolting application imaginable. For custom projects, our highly experienced engineering team is at your service to design the most efficient solution for your job with simple operation and economical pricing in mind.

We are consistently improving upon existing products, and developing new tools, based on feedback from the people that use our tools every day. Our latest product line features patented industry-firsts like hands-free operation to keep tool operators at a safe distance from the application, onboard documentation systems to provide job accountability and assurance, and industry-leading bolt load accuracy to reduce nut loosening and joint failure.

With authorized repair facilities located all over the world, fast and professional service is always available. Our latest bolting systems are guaranteed to stop leaks on pressurized vessels and eliminate unwanted nut loosening. Our mission is to make our customers’ jobs as safe and hassle-free as possible. Contact HYTORC today to find out how we can optimize your bolting processes.

Help HYTORC Improve Our Products and Services - Please Take a Quick Survey at https://hytorc.com/customer-satisfaction-survey

Name: ASJ PTE LTD

In addition to the manufacturing of resistors, the Group also distributes electronic and non-electronic components in ASEAN region, China, India and Korea. Our extensive network covers Europe and USA too.
ASJ was listed on the Stock Exchange of Singapore in January 1997, making us the first resistor manufacturer to be listed on the Singapore bourse. In 2002, ASJ was listed on the Mainboard of the Singapore Stock Exchange.
We develop and continuously improve our process technologies to manufacture our resistors efficiently meeting stringent quality standards and within a competitive cost structure framework. Our reliability test program ensures our resistors meet the highest international standards (MIL, JIS, EIA).
ASJ's manufacturing facility in Malaysia consists of a two-storey factory located in Johor, Senai and has a built-in area of 9,500 sq m..
Headquartered in Singapore, our sales coverage extended beyond Singapore with the establishment of direct and representative offices in Malaysia, Europe, South Korea, Thailand, India, PRC and the United States of America.
With the projection of growth in this industry, we are committed to position ASJ as one of the largest Chip Resistors manufacturer in South Asia.

Description:
L.D. Waxson Group was established in 1985 by Dr. Tor Lam Huat who has led the company to create many household name products and clinch many SMEs awards.

Wipro Enterprises forms the non-IT business of Wipro Group. It has Wipro Consumer Care and Lighting and Wipro Infrastructure Engineering under its umbrella. 

Wipro Consumer Care and Lighting is a leading FMCG business in Personal Care, Home Care, Lighting & Switches and Office Furniture. Wipro Infrastructure Engineering is a diversified engineering business in the fields of Hydraulics, Water Treatment, Additive Manufacturing, Aerospace and Automation Solutions.

Wipro Consumer Care and Lighting is among the fastest growing FMCG businesses in its operating geographies of Asia and the Middle East. Its businesses include personal wash products, skincare products, male grooming products, toiletries, domestic and commercial lighting and modular office furniture. It has a strong brand presence with significant market share across segments in India, South East Asia, the Middle East and South Africa.

The acquisition of Unza (2007), Yardley (2009), LD Waxson (2012), Zhongshan Ma Er (2016), Splash (2019) and Canway (2019) has given Wipro Consumer Care a global footprint. Its key brands include Santoor, Chandrika, Glucovita Glucose powder and Bolts, Northwest Switches, Enchanteur, Safi, Romano, Bio Essence, Yardley, Carrie, Pahnli, Garnet, SkinWhite, MaxiPeel, Vitress and Oh So Heavenly.

Name: Heatec Jietong Holdings
Description:
Heatec JieTong is a leading provider of piping and heat exchanger services for the marine, petrochemical, oil & gas industries. Our core business activities are in the provision of piping services and heat exchanger servicing and fabrication.
 
We provide piping services such as pipeline structure, restoration and installation works for all types of pipes and systems to shipyards in Singapore. In addition, Heatec Jietong also performs process piping works including piping fabrication for Floating Production, Storage and Offloading (FPSO) turrets. Heatec Jietong recently expanded the scope of the piping business to include turnkey project management. Our piping division has been continuously voted best Piping Contractor by major shipyards in Singapore - specializing in FPSO and oil rig high-pressure piping works.
 
Heatec Jietong also services various types of heat exchangers that are utilised on board marine vessels and onshore petrochemical plants and refinery. Our heat exchanger services include on-site inspection, engineering, consultancy, fabrication and restoration of main engine charged air coolers, condensers, heaters, fresh water generators and other heat transfer applications. We provide these services regionally including mainland China and Philipines.
 
Our extensive experience in these fields gives us the edge in offering our customers high quality products and timely delivery of services.

Our products are economically priced and designed to meet the needs of our OEM worldwide as well as end users with no compromise in quality.

We are the recipient of the ISO 9001:2008 Quality Award, and have received a Qualification Assessment Notification (QAN) as well as a Qualification Assessment Report (QAR) which allows to design and manufacture products that meet both ATEX directive and the IECEx Certificate of conformity. Our facilities are audited by FM, CSA and the appropriate ATEX authorities. We have a wide range of products that meet all four major certification authorities in the world (FM, CSA, ATEX and IECEx). In addition, we welcome customers to submit their own custom designed enclosure and we can design, develop and certify with all the four authorities a cost effective enclosure in both Copper-Free Aluminum and 316 Stainless Steel. Fully equipped with state of the art manufacturing facilities and backed by a team of qualified and dedicated design and production engineers, International Metal Engineering is positioned to meet the ever changing demands of process industries worldwide.

Description:
The team at BestLabs have accrued proficiency in the calibration arena for two decades. Our core focus is to deliver accurate calibration. Together with our primary service of in-house calibration for vast client base, we also cater for onsite service calibration as well as repair services for all major industries.

Clark Forklift with its high quality, tough durability, and excellent performance is a favourite with many users. Clark's low-emission engines, drive trains, oil-cooled wet disc brakes, and other technologies continue to enhance Clark Forklift's reliability and popularity.

TCIM Forklift Rental offers excellent service support, reliability, and professionalism. TCiM maintains a young fleet of equipment catering to Long and Short Term Rentals.

TCIM's Refurbished Forklift has achieved recognition in the market as an affordable and reliable alternative to a brand new Forklift. A wide range of models, varying masts, and attachments are available.

TCiM provides the ready channel for customers to upgrade and trade-in their forklifts with no hassle. "As Is Where Is" Used Forklifts are available for budget-conscious customers.

Forklift Service Department provides both in-house and field services. Skilled Technicians ensure the Forklifts are in tip-top condition through tailored Preventive Maintenance Programs. The Service Department can also handle all other makes of Forklifts.

Supporting all the departments is the Spare Parts Department which has a fully computerized spare parts inventory system. Readily available and competitively priced spare parts ensure high serviceability and minimum downtime. On-going range expansion and no compromise on quality are factors that make TCiM a leading source for parts and accessories. The Department also markets a wide range of Forklift Seats and Solid Tyres.

Our products are manufactured at the state-of-the-art factory in Sindelfingen, Germany. More than 20% of staff in Sindelfingen are working in R&D to create new solutions and applications for our customers. We have a tightly-linked global network of service partners in all major continents, staffed with highly qualified personnel offering extensive service such as setup, maintenance, training and calibration. This is how Fischer guarantees the reliability and precision of its products. Worldwide.

Coselec is a subsidiary of deister electronic GmbH and is fully owned by the deister holding group in Germany.

Working closely with many of our strategic business partners and customers, our systems and solutions are deployed in major vertical market segments such as banking and finance, educational institutions, government agencies, ministries, hotels, healthcare, real estate, petrochemical, casino, aviation, etc.

Our innovative and cutting-edge technological products have won many accolades and awards. This accomplishment is a testament to Coselec’s ability and commitment to deliver highly reliable and advanced solutions to its business partners and customers. 

Coselec carries a wide-ranging products and systems to meet every security needs of our customers.  All the products and systems are fully engineered and manufactured with German technology.  Our products are technologically field-proven, tested and future-proofed.

Name: FPT Far East Pte Ltd
Description:
FPT Far East Pte Ltd is part of the Motion Asia Pacific Group and is focused on being a partner of choice for industrial component supply and future sustainability in the Asia Pacific region. A Singapore based company, it supplies a wide range of premium products into industrial markets. FPT represents a number of global brands including Fenner power transmissions, Esco couplings, Delevan Spray Technologies and Cooper bearings. 

The company was founded in Singapore during 1989 as a joint venture between Fenner UK and a local Singapore partner. During that time, the company distributed a variety of European branded power transmission products and added value to its key customers by providing expert product knowledge and holding the required stock in the strategically located Singapore warehouse.

In 2014, it was acquired by the Inenco Group (currently known as Motion Asia Pacific Group), an Australasian group of companies with an annual turnover in excess of A$440 million per annum and more than 1500 employees across Australia, New Zealand and Asia.

Today, FPT Far East Pte Ltd continues to expand its distributor network within the Asian region and through the strategically placed Singapore warehouse, excellent product knowledge, quality products and strong distributor network, it’s geared towards its vision of being a partner of choice for industrial parts and future sustainability.

Name: Big Ass Fans Singapore
Description:
In 1999, Big Ass Fans was born. Kind of. Then called the HVLS Fan Co. (that’s High Volume, Low Speed), we first made our mark selling massive ceiling fans. The fans kept large spaces that lacked air conditioning, such as factories and dairy barns, feeling cool and comfortable by moving large volumes of air at a low speed. In 2001, we finally took the hint when customers kept calling and asking if we made “those big-ass fans” and changed our name for good. This was just the beginning.

As our business grew, so did our customers’ needs. After noting that several customers were purchasing Big Ass Fans for their homes, we decided to develop a line of upgraded residential fans. Our line of silent, stylish Haiku fans blew away ENERGY STAR ratings and won awards worldwide. Then we took it a step further by automating personal comfort and adding SenseME technology to our residential fans. Add in our line of evaporative coolers and we have comfort covered from top-to-bottom and everywhere in between.

Our commitment to our customers remains our top priority. We’ve backed everything with serious research, intensive engineering, and an almost obsessive drive to innovate and improve. We look to provide comfort where comfort seems impossible, with our Singapore office continuing to strive for optimal performance and service.

At E-Abel, we believe that electricity is a fundamental part of just about everything people do. That's why we're dedicated to helping our customers find new ways to manage electrical, climate control and mechanical power more efficiently, safely and sustainably by enclosures. Because this what really matters. And we’re here to make sure it works.

As a wholly-owned subsidiary of ITAP rooted in China, E-Abel is founded as an internationally corporation which develops flexible business practice in China, United States, and Singapore.

Its production base in Lishui Industrial Park, Foshan, GD, enjoys exceptional locational advantages, featuring a quick access to Hong Kong and Macao. With a R&D team from Singapore, the global business manages segments in China such as manufacturing, sales management, assembly and after-sales service.

While E-Abel's vision has long been more than just innovation, it's cutting-edge production facilities and practical Quality Management represent the voice of enclosure pioneers – a commitment of consistent high-quality. Also remarkable: E-Abel never loses sight of the bigger picture, by staying active in registering patents.

Flexible, practical, remarkable. E-Abel delivers the perfect solution.

Name: FireStore Singapore
Description:
FireStore is the biggest and most comprehensive online store in Southeast Asia for all things related to fire safety awareness and protection.

A small fire incident can easily and often become a big hazard quickly, destroying assets and hurting lives. Having seen over 2,000 cases of residential and industrial fires, we realise that the general public has very little to no understanding of basic fire safety awareness, not to mention knowledge to react and respond correctly and safely in a fire situation.

FireStore is set up with the advocacy of fire safety awareness and protection in mind, to provide a platform - both online and offline - for the general public to readily access information and essential tips about fire safety, and a comprehensive range of fire safety equipment, such as smoke alarms, fire extinguishers and break glass panels among many others, that anyone can buy from and install in their offices and/or homes.

FireStore proactively strives to raise fire safety awareness by engaging the public through roving roadshows and interactive exhibitions that educate important fire safety facts and demonstrate correct usage of simple fire fighting equipment and emergency devices, as well as how to handle real-life fire scenarios.

Together we can keep our families and loved ones safe and protected.

In a work environment, an unresolved small problem can manifest into one that requires a costly solution.
 
At TMD, we have helped our customers overcome these work challenges through timely and cost-effective innovative engineering solutions, special projects, and MRO Services. We are honoured to be granted the status of one of Singapore Air Force's Essential Companies and are approved vendors of ST Engineering.
 
Backed by our current engineering expertise of prototyping using Altair HyperWorks; numerical simulation; customised solutions; fabrication of steel, stainless steel, and aluminum; integration; testing; certification; reference documentation preparation; and after-sales services to meet the specific requirements of our customers, TMD has entered into the crane trading business with HYVA, which is one of the world's leading providers of highly innovative and efficient transport solutions for the commercial vehicle and environmental service.
 
In addition to our customized solutions, TMD Mobility also works with customers on equipment/structure/vehicle’s total life cycle support; from vehicle/equipment design, computer simulation, physical trial, manufacturability, initial logistic support, inspection, certification, documentation, MRO to end-of-life decommissioning of equipment and vehicles.
 
Our expertise in vehicle/equipment Maintenance and Total Life Cycle Support favourably position the company as a preferred contractor to organizations that are facing challenges in the maintenance of vehicle/equipment fleet that are Petrol, Diesel, Fully Electric or even Hybrid Electric powered. This allows for multiple cost savings, which are passed on to customers. Hence, providing them with excellent value for money.
 
TMD Mobility is also an Singapore Accreditation Council ISO 9001, ISO 45001, ISO 18001, and bizSAFE star certified organization.

As one of the leaders in the manufacture of precision components and assemblies, BIGL is a key provider of actuator arms, assemblies and other related parts mainly for the global hard disk drive (“HDD”) industry. BIGL is a trusted partner and has grown with our customers, who are recognised leaders in the HDD industry. Following the closing of a mandatory cash offer in 2024, BIGL has become a subsidiary of the PATEC Group, leveraging on the combined expertise to innovate and develop higher value products. Listed on the Taiwan Stock Exchange, PATEC is in the business of manufacturing and sales of automobile and motorcycle stamping components, as well as stamping production line equipment.

In 2025, as part of our long-term vision to deliver greater value through vertical integration and operational excellence, BIGL acquired a majority stake in ZLY, a precision tooling design and production house. This strategic acquisition strengthens our position as a fully integrated manufacturer and complements our core capabilities in precision machining, allowing the Group to offer end-to-end manufacturing solutions to customers, enhance responsiveness to design changes and accelerate time-to-market for complex components.

Name: Elok Asia Pte Ltd
Description:
Elok is a specialised design and manufacturing company with a focus on guarding tank terminals /  road tankers from ignition hazards of static electricity through the implementation of our Tanker Earthing Systems.
The equipment measures whether a vehicle is grounded properly to avoid risk of ignition . Correct grounding is considered as an interlock condition for loading/unloading that must be in place before the loading/unloading operation can commence.

Why is Electrostatic Grounding important? 
To prevent uncontrolled electrostatic discharges which could lead to ignition hazardous when loading and unloading flammable liquids and powder from: 
Road trucks
Rail wagons 
Containers 
Drums 
Bags C-FIBC

Apart from ensuring  road tank-car and tank wagons are earthed correctly and free from static electricity during loading and unloading for flammable liquids there are many other applications where the quality of the electrostatic grounding is important e.g. C FIB-C bags where electrostatic build up could be hazardous and basically containers that are being filled/unfilled or refilled. 

The key benefit of using Elok for your products is that we provide a complete service from developing your idea, electronically, mechanical, finding the correct enclosure solution through prototyping, testing and certification to final serial production.

All this in-house using our own highly experienced design teams and manufacturing capacity with over 25 years experience designing and manufacturing equipment for explosive atmospheres (Ex).

Elok Asia services and supports Elok's clients in Asia and the Middle East.

Name: Teochew Restaurant Huat Kee(1998) Pte Ltd
Description:
We have been serving authentic Teochew cuisine since 1969. We started from an outlet on the pavement of a coffee shop in Wayang Street. With the need for increased space we moved to Ellenborough Market in the Teochew heartland.

In 1988 we had the chance to have an open-air restaurant, which could cater to diners in the evening. This was in what was then known as Happy World in Geylang. We were there till 1993. During that time, conservation of Chinatown buildings was in full swing and we saw an opportunity to move up-market as our reputation for Teochew cuisine had grown and we had a faithful clientele that had followed us wherever we were. We felt that with growing prosperity there were also clients who wanted authentic Teochew cuisine but in a more congenial atmosphere with air-conditioning and ambience. We made the move to Amoy Street in 1993. As business prospered we felt that a better financial infrastructure had to be in place to cater for expansion. Huat Kee Teochew Restaurant, which had all the while been a family partnership, was converted into Teochew Restaurant Huat Kee (1998) Pte. Ltd.

Description:
Sansui, a globally recognized brand name and one of the World leaders in consumer electronics, was founded in 1944. Sansui started manufacturing transformers and subsequently, expanded into manufacturing Hi-Fi amplifiers and other electrical equipment. Historically, Sansui has been a technology leader in the electronic industry, with such firsts as: First Audio Transformer; First High Powered Tube-transistor Amplifier; First in the World with matrix "surround sound" in 1970; Stereo AM in 1976 and Digital Sound Processing in 1983, to mention but a few.

Sansui is now primarily engaged in the design, manufacture and marketing of home audio/video products. Sansui audio / video products consist of an extensive range of Home Theater Systems, AV Receivers, Component Systems, DVD Players, Mini and Micro Systems, Portables, Discman, Portable MP3 Players, 5.1 Speaker Systems, and a range of Television products that also include LCD/Plasma and Rear Projection Televisions.

Sansui is committed to providing an integrated service to our customers, which consists of commitment to excellent product quality, up-to-date product design, competitive market pricing and constantly expanding its distribution networks for easy access of our products. Sansui is committed to giving our customers the best products along with the best service.

Name: AA Precision Optics
Description:
Welcome to AAPO! We specialize in the mass production of precision optics. Our services are tailored to your unique requirements. All we need to get started is a sketch; if you don't have one, that's okay! We are your partners from the planning stage through to delivering high-quality mass-produced items. Our work complies with stringent ISO standards, ensuring flawless results exactly as you envisioned them.
Consolidating all processes in one location, especially when collaborating with reliable partners, is critically important for several reasons. First, having all operations in a single venue enhances effective communication among team members and partners. Second, it improves the quality control measures in place. Third, it contributes to higher cost efficiency. Lastly, quick and real-time decisions can be made more effectively when all stakeholders are located in the same place.
Our journey dates back to 1974, when our founder, Avi Ayalon, ventured into the Electro-Optics industry in Singapore. With an unwavering dedication to innovation, Avi was pivotal in establishing the Avimo Singapore Electro-Optics factory. He was referred to as " the grandfather of digital projection".  In 2013, Avi founded AA Precision Optics. Though we lost Avi in July 2022, we remain committed to carrying on his legacy.

Apart from being battery- and maintenance-free, the self-powered wireless temperature sensor product line is also designed to easily monitor hard-to-reach locations. Name: Visco Jet Asia
Description:
Visco Jet excels in agitating dense mixtures, whether liquid-liquid or solid-liquid. Effortlessly managing agitation tasks, it ranges from lab-scale to over 680cbm in bulk. Visco Jet provides tailored solutions for agitation tasks up to and beyond 16000 mPas.

Visco Jet Agitator is able to effectively:
1. Homogenization - effective mixing handles even the most viscous mixtures
2. Suspension - stir up and keep sediment suspended
3. Dispersion - break up lumps of power/solids
4. Aeration / Deaeration - collects and allow the air in the medium to bubble out
5. Heat transfer - effective mixing allow heat to be rapidly transferred

Some of the products that Visco Jet is able to agitate much better than conventional impellers:
- Food & Beverages: yogurt, milk, chocolate with nuts, juice concentration with pulp, food flavouring, honey,
- Personal Care & Pharmaceutical : toothpaste, gel, shower gel, facial foam, cosmetics, medication
- Building & Construction: wall plaster, paint, waterproofing bitumen, concrete polymer
- Industrial: fuels, lubricants, chemicals, glue, coatings
- and many more.

For more information please contact our sales at info@ViscoJetAsia.com

Many of our customers have upgraded from conventional agitators, it's time that you upgrade too!

Name: HUAY FENG HANG PTE LTD (HUIJI)
Description:
Huay Feng Hang Pte Ltd was established in 1988 and started out as an importer/exporter, distributor and wholesaler of medical and health products. Over the past decades, the company has grown exponentially to become a trusted brand representing a stellar range of medical and health products sold globally today. We have more than 25 years of experience specializing in producing and marketing innovative Traditional Chinese Medicine (TCM) products.

Our constant strives for quality has resulted in significant market penetration into all leading supermarkets, major pharmacies and medical halls. As a mark of our organization’s excellence, we have been awarded the ISO 9001 certification. The implementation of the ISO 9001 quality control system has further inspired us to produce an unrivalled diversity of products so we can meet the needs of our customers in their pursuit of good health.

One of our bestsellers are Huiji Waist Tonic – the leading No.1 brand for Waist Tonic in Singapore (having won the Unity Popular Choice Award – TCM Supplement consecutively for six years from 2009 – 2015). Our waist tonic is made of 100% premium natural herbs including Cordyceps, Ginseng, Du Zhong, Dang Gui, Shou Wu and Da Zao. This unique formula helps to combat rheumatism, overcome fatigue, nourish vital energy and is especially beneficial for those who experiences lower back pain and backache. It does not contain alcohol and added sugar, thus suitable to be consumed during confinement.

To further enhance and control the quality assurance of our Huiji Waist Tonic, we shifted our production unit to Singapore and even received recognition as a GMP (Good Manufacturing Practices) Certified Factory by Health Sciences Authority (HSA) – an enduring symbol of our stringent quality control.

Name: Unicontrols Singapore Pte Ltd

Name: Chitonous
Description:
CHITONOUS PTE. LTD. is a startup focused on the development of large-scale manufacture with biological materials, enabling circular and sustainable economic models while providing a manufacture advantage to its adopters.
Our flagship FLAM 3D process is the first fully sustainable biological additive manufacturing process, capable of producing large-scale products at low-cost with unmatched environmental characteristics. 
We offer the world the missing link towards a sustainable society and circular economy through the integration of biological materials and manufacturing. Our process uses natural materials available in every ecosystem, including highly urbanized environments. Name: one to ONE Holdings Pte. Ltd.
Description:
We, one to One Holdings (o2Oh) is a holding company based in Singapore, which originated in Japan, to support, improve and revolutionise steel manufacturing. We have our companies in Japan, Vietnam, USA, and India following the group's vision. 

Our companies are best described as follows: 

DSTI—Daiwa Steel Tube Industries, Japan: Founded in 1932, has been catering to high-quality galvanised tube products to date, including in-line galvanised steel tubes and high-tensile steel tubes for general structures. DSTI also develops operational systems and services and has the world’s only state-of-the-art OD + ID Galvanizing tube manufacturing process. 
DLI - Daiwa Lance International, Vietnam: Manufacturing and sales of lance pipes, a niche product known as Calorized Lance Pipes for Steel Melting Shops (Electric Arc Furnaces, Blast Furnaces and Ladle Furnaces), and secondary steel products with a global presence in 52 countries. Has been in business since 1996. 
STI - Superior Technologies Inc., USA: Design, manufacturing, and sales of in-line galvanising and monitoring equipment, as well as their operational support and services. STI developed their very first in-line galvanising system and coating processes in 1962, and to date is continuously improving the process.
DAS  - Daiwa Anaya Steel, India: A joint venture company of Daiwa Steel Tube Industries, Japan and Anaya Steel, USA. DAS shares the path towards marketing and distribution of our lancing and coated products.   
IML - Industrial ML, USA: Develops real-time data handling platforms for Smart Factory Solutions and Total Productive Maintenance using Industry 4.0 Tools include Machine Learning (ML), Deep Learning (DL), and Artificial Intelligence (AI). IML has been a constant partner of o2Oh to develop and test its SFS products at DSTI and DLI.

Name: Trimax Machinery
Description:
Trimax Machinery was founded in Singapore in 2009 with a simple aim to provide “Simply Better Crushers” for rock and mineral processing. Since then, Trimax Machinery has become an engineering company committed to supplying a broad spectrum of efficient rock and mineral processing machinery to our customers that yield superior productivity and return on investment. The common fundamental foundation of all our machinery is superior efficiency and durability incorporated into their design. 

	Our concentration of business is mainly within the South East Asian region, with subsidiary companies in Indonesia and Malaysia. However, by continuously building our brand and intensifying our global marketing communication efforts to the rest of the world, we are making significant inroads in expanding our global reach through regional distributors.

Key to our success is an unwavering commitment to quality throughout every aspect of our business. Trimax Machinery works with qualified suppliers that can ensure that our products are amongst the best-in-class in terms of stringent and consistent quality. Trimax Machinery is headquartered in Singapore and operates an assembly plant in Johor, Malaysia, where parts undergo another round of inspection prior to assembly. Last but not least, assembled crushers are tested prior to final delivery to customers.  

After-sales service includes us maintaining a minimum stock level of all spare parts for our machinery, machinery operators attending an user training program at one of our assembly plants, as well as a service maintenance program whereby regular on-site visits are made by our Service Engineers to check on the condition of the machinery whilst in operation. Therefore, no matter where our machinery is installed in any part of the world, they are supported by a world-class premium parts and service organization to ensure optimum product reliability, availability and customer support.

EXTRUDING EXCELLENCE, SINCE 1988

As a brand, Litaflex enjoys clear distinction in many ways:

 

CUSTOMER FOCUS
We place our clients at the heart of our business. We deliver a positive brand experience at every touchpoint through a synergy of professionalism and proficiency.

ROBUST INFRASTRUCTURE AND PROMPT DELIVERY
Our cutting-edge production facilities and spacious warehousing in Singapore and Malaysia measuring more than 10,000 square meters is highlighted by more than 20 lines of the latest Extruders, Palletizers and Mixers from Europe and Taiwan.

LITAFLEX’s consolidated structure also reduces the lead time needed from order to delivery. Coupled with a fleet of delivery trucks, LITAFLEX possesses sufficient capacity and storage to ensure timely and efficient delivery even at a very short notice.

INNOVATION AND CONTINUOUS IMPROVEMENT
Along with the growing market in Singapore and the region, Litaflex has also been constantly working towards continuous improvement. Being an innovative and a dedicated manufacturer, LITAFLEX regularly upgrade its manufacturing facility with the latest extruders and other ancillary equipment to increase its manufacturing efficiency, improve its quality consistency, and offer a wider range of products to its customers.

Our backward integration into in-house compounding and mixing of raw material has also taken LITAFLEX to the next level where quality control, cost efficiency, and thus competitive pricing is achieved.

Name: Gree Singapore
Description:
Gree Electric Appliances, Inc. of Zhuhai is a diversified international technology-based global industrial group, whose business covers residential air conditioners, central air conditioners, household consumer goods, and industrial equipment. 

Established in 1991, Gree is renowned for its development concept of Independent Innovation and the goal to build a centenary enterprise. The success of this mission has seen it develop 24 cutting-edge technologies sold widely in more than 160 countries and regions, to more than 300 million users globally. 

In recognition, Gree has been top-ranked as the No. 1 in production and sales volume of residential air conditioners for 13 consecutive years since 2005. 

Gree has also been awarded the No. 1 brand of air conditioners in the world by Euromonitor International in 2021 and 2022, and is ranked No. 252 in the Forbes Global 2000, up from No. 294 in 2018.

Looking ahead, Gree is committed to its passion for innovation and goals for the business – to build a centenary enterprise and create a legacy of quality air conditioners that will improve lives for generations to come.

Name: Line8 Pte Ltd
Description:
Line8. The new way to plug-in

Power outlets that move together with your appliances; removing cable clutter. Power outlets that can be added and removed; eliminating the need for ugly multi-plug extensions. 

Ultra Smooth Engagement and Sliding Mechanism. Patented Electro-Mechanical Safety Technology. Fully Custom-built to Order in Singapore. Wood, Marble and Metallic Finishes Available.

The newest in technological advancement in Power Rails for homes, offices and professional facilities. Embodied in a simple elegant design which boasts numerous unique features. I present to you Line8.

Derived from its core function the Line8 is a linear power rail where an “infinite ∞” number of power outlets can be plugged into the power rail with a simple twist; symbolically represented by the number 8.

Together with over 10 years of experience in the power rail business, I believe and embrace that this is the concept for the future. The Line8 Power Rail System is a truly great product which is defined by its integration of its form and function.

By utilising the latest in manufacturing and finishing technologies. Using the best and most durable materials. Coupled with a truly modular design we have created a product which is easy-to-use, energy efficient, durable and most importantly, safe.

Integrated within are the latest in Smart-Home, IoT, Green Renewable Energy, Smart Grid Technologies. Incorporating multimedia points like HDMI, Cat6 Data, Telephone to name a few will ensure seamless integration. Plugging in to both power, data and technology can never be easier.

The patented design is made from premium aircraft grade hairline-black aluminium, with optional 3M DI-NOC vinyl, special finishes like Italian Bianco marble and satin/polished precious woods will add that extra finesse to any interior design.
